Method: R3C（递归类连接分类）框架：将增强后的二值分割图像反复反馈回分类过程，每次中间分割结果与原始输入图像结合，迭代延伸脊线结构，且不依赖底层分类器修改或训练数据。

Result: 在三个指纹数据集上使用四种增强分类器，儿童TAR提升4%，新生儿TAR提升40%以上；定性分析显示R3C能重新连接断裂的脊线模式，提升分割视觉质量。

Conclusion: R3C是一种与增强方法无关的灵活通用解决方案，可显著改善婴儿指纹二值分割效果，且无需训练数据。

Abstract: Image enhancement plays a crucial role in infant fingerprint matching, as child-specific characteristics such as smaller finger dimensions and thinner ridge structures often degrade image quality during acquisition. To address these limitations, enrollment typically depends on specialized highresolution scanners, which most existing enhancement methods are not designed to support. Consequently, identification rates for children remain significantly lower than those achieved with adult fingerprints. This study introduces Recursive Class Connectivity Classification (R3C), a novel framework that iteratively refines binary segmentation outputs from existing enhancement methods by extending ridge structures. R3C does not require modifications to the underlying classifier and operates without training data, which is not currently available for infant fingerprints. Instead, the method improves segmentation by repeatedly feeding the classified image back into the classification process, while combining each intermediate segmentation with the original input image. Experiments conducted on three fingerprint datasets using four different enhancement classifiers show that R3C can increase the True Acceptance Rate (TAR) by up to 4% for children and over 40% for newborns, compared to using the enhancement methods alone. A qualitative analysis further demonstrates that R3C reconnects fragmented ridge patterns, improving the visual quality of segmentation. Because it functions independently of the enhancement method used, R3C provides a flexible and broadly applicable solution for improving binary segmentation.

</details>


### [147] [Stabilizing Streaming Video Geometry via Dynamic Feature Normalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25308)
*Xiaoyang Lyu,Muxin Liu,Xiaoshan Wu,Ruicheng Wang,Yi-Hua Huang,Yang-Tian Sun,Shaoshuai Shi,Xiaojuan Qi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DyFN（动态特征归一化），一种轻量级因果循环模块，通过对齐特征统计量（均值与方差）来解决单目深度估计模型在流式输入中的尺度-偏移漂移问题，仅用2%额外参数微调即可实现时间一致的3D几何估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单目深度基础模型在单张图像上精度很高，但在连续输入时存在严重的时间不一致性，主要表现为尺度与偏移的漂移。作者通过实证分析将不稳定性的根源追溯到潜在特征统计量的波动（均值和方差直接影响预测深度的尺度和偏移）。

Method: 提出DyFN（Dynamic Feature Normalization），一个轻量级因果循环模块，能够动态且鲁棒地调制特征统计量，从而在时间维度上维持稳定的几何估计。该方法冻结预训练骨干网络，仅微调DyFN模块（仅占2%的参数），将强大的单目几何模型适配为流式模型。

Result: 在四个基准数据集上，DyFN有效消除了时间伪影（如不连续的分层和位置抖动），在时间稳定性上达到SOTA，比先前的流式方法提升高达14%，甚至超过了更重的非因果视频基线方法。

Conclusion: DyFN通过轻量级特征统计量调制，在不牺牲单帧精度的前提下显著提升了流式深度估计的时间一致性，为将单目基础模型部署到实际流式场景（如自动驾驶、具身AI）提供了高效且有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Consistent 3D geometry estimation from streaming RGB input is crucial for real-world applications such as autonomous driving, embodied AI, and large-scale reconstruction. While modern monocular geometry foundation models achieve strong single-image accuracy, they exhibit severe temporal inconsistency on continuous input, notably dominated by scale--shift drifting. Through targeted empirical analysis, we trace this instability to its root cause: fluctuations in latent feature statistics, whose mean and variance directly determine the predicted depth's scale and shift. Building on this insight, we introduce Dynamic Feature Normalization (DyFN), a lightweight, causal recurrent module that dynamically and robustly modulates feature statistics to maintain stable geometry over time. We adapt powerful pretrained monocular geometry models for streaming by finetuning only DyFN, a mere 2\% additional parameters, while keeping the backbone frozen, thereby achieving temporal consistency without compromising single-image accuracy. Extensive experiments across four benchmarks show that DyFN effectively eliminates temporal artifacts such as disjointed layering and positional jitter, and achieves state-of-the-art temporal stability, improving over prior streaming methods by up to 14\% and even outperforming heavier non-causal video baselines. Project Page: https://shawlyu.github.io/DyFN

</details>


### [148] [Perceive-then-Plan: Layout-as-Policy for Monocular 3D Scene Layout Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25326)
*Junwei Zhou,Yu-Wing Tai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Layout-as-Policy (LaP)，将单张图像的3D布局估计建模为"感知-规划"问题，利用视觉语言模型先感知物体再通过策略学习迭代优化布局，生成更符合物理规律和视觉观察的3D场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 直接从单张图像预测3D布局难以同时满足视觉观察和物理空间约束，传统的一次性预测方法难以处理全局约束和复杂的物体间交互关系。

Method: 将3D布局估计分为两个阶段：1) Perceiver阶段利用几何增强的视觉语言模型从图像中定位3D物体；2) Planner阶段将布局优化建模为策略学习问题，通过平移、旋转、缩放等离散动作迭代修正布局，结合监督轨迹初始化和偏好优化进行训练。

Result: 生成的布局在物理合理性上更优，与视觉观察的匹配度更高，并自然地支持场景编辑和操作等下游任务。

Conclusion: 将布局估计从一次性预测转化为迭代优化过程，有效提升了布局的物理一致性和物体交互合理性，为单目3D场景理解提供了新范式。

Abstract: Building structured 3D scene layouts from a single image requires reconciling visual observations with physical and spatial constraints, a challenge that is difficult to address with direct prediction alone. In this work, we formulate monocular 3D layout estimation as a perceive-then-plan problem with vision-language models, where a Perceiver first grounds the 3D objects and then a Planner iteratively refines the scene hypothesis through actions that improve physical plausibility while preserving consistency with the input image. We propose Layout-as-Policy (LaP), which casts the planning stage as a policy learning problem: 3D layouts are represented as structured states, and refined via discrete actions such as translation, rotation, and rescaling. Starting from an observation-aligned initialization with the geometry-enhanced Perceiver, the LaP Planner is trained to produce action sequences that progressively resolve geometric inconsistencies and enforce realistic spatial relations. To enable effective learning, we combine supervised trajectory initialization with preference-based optimization, allowing the model to learn corrective behaviors without requiring explicit reward engineering. This formulation transforms layout estimation from a one-shot prediction task into an iterative refinement process, enabling better handling of global constraints and complex object interactions. Experiments demonstrate that our approach produces layouts that are more physically coherent and better aligned with visual observations, while naturally supporting downstream tasks such as scene editing and manipulation.

</details>


### [149] [DIVA: Harnessing the Representation Divergence in Unified Multimodal Models for Mutual Reinforcement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25328)
*Renjie Lu,Xulong Zhang,Xiaoyang Qu,Shangfei Wang,Jianzong Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DIVA框架，通过将视觉表示分解为共享和独特组件，并利用互信息估计，解决了统一多模态模型中理解与生成任务之间的互扰问题，在两个任务上分别提升7.82%和8.46%。 


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 统一多模态模型（UMMs）中，生成任务需要高保真、细粒度的表示，而理解任务需要语义判别性、与任务无关因素不变的嵌入。两种监督信号带来的归纳偏置不同，在单一骨干网络中优化这些互补但不等价的目标会导致相互损害而非增强。

Method: 提出DIVA（自改进后训练框架）：1）分析发现统一主干网络中内部表示存在互补结构；2）将视觉表示显式分解为共享组件和独特组件，基于两条互补信息流；3）通过互信息估计，使理解分支和生成分支实现有益的迁移，同时保护独特信息免受跨流干扰。

Result: 在视觉理解任务上提升7.82%，生成任务上提升8.46%。

Conclusion: DIVA通过将表示分歧转化为内部协同，有效解决了UMMs中理解与生成的互扰问题，且方法具有通用性。

Abstract: Unified Multimodal models (UMMs) built on a single architecture have shown impressive performance in both understanding and generation. We identify a fundamental challenge that lies in inductive biases induced by distinct supervision signals: generation branch prefers high-fidelity, fine-grained representations capable of reconstruction, while the understanding favours semantically discriminative embeddings that remain invariant to task-irrelevant factors. Consequently, optimizing these complementary but non-equivalent objectives within a monolithic backbone leads to mutual impairment instead of enhancement. In this paper, we first analyze the root cause of this interference in unified backbones and reveal a complementary structure in their internal representations. Motivated by the observation, we propose DIVA, a self-improved post-training framework that transforms the representation divergence into interior synergy. By explicitly factorizing the visual representation into shared and unique components based on two complementary information flow, DIVA enables both the understanding and generation branches to achieve beneficial transferring while preserving the integrity of unique information from cross-flow interference via mutual information estimation. Despite its generality, our method consistently achieves improvements across visual understanding (+7.82%) and generation (+8.46%). The official code is available at: https://github.com/Jayyy-H/DIVA.

</details>


### [150] [Teaching Video Generators to Remember: Eliciting Dynamic Memory for Out-of-Sight State Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25333)
*Tianshuo Xu,Yichen Xie,Depu Meng,Chensheng Peng,Quentin Herau,Bo Jiang,Yihan Hu,Wei Zhan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出ReMind框架，通过记忆导向数据、事件感知训练和缓存适配，使视频扩散Transformer在中断时仍能动态记忆和检索历史状态，解决视频世界模型在未观测时刻状态冻结的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频生成模型在观测中断时会冻结隐藏状态，无法维持动态演进的世界状态。作者认为这不是容量问题——预训练模型已有KV-cache机制可用于非局部检索，但缺乏针对性训练。

Method: 构建基于100+动态事件的带相机标注的训练混合数据集（含VLM过滤真实视频、生成硬动态、合成相机循环和记忆中断增强）；将每个片段转换为带保护锚点、退化区间和显式时间间隙的帧图；设计节点结构化课程（节点丢弃、噪声记忆、前沿延续和参考缓存训练）；提出PM-RoPE扩展实现单注意力代价下的时空检索。

Result: 在STEVO-Bench和恢复任务上取得最佳综合得分；通用图像到视频评估验证课程训练未导致灾难性遗忘。

Conclusion: 通过专门的数据构建和课程训练，可以激发视频扩散Transformer的动态记忆能力，且不会牺牲通用生成性能。

Abstract: Video world models should maintain evolving states when evidence is unobserved, yet current generators often freeze hidden states upon interruption. This is not simply a capacity problem: pretrained video diffusion transformers already possess KV-cache mechanisms capable of non-local retrieval, but they are rarely trained to use them as dynamic memory. We introduce ReMind, a framework eliciting dynamic memory behavior via memory-oriented data, event-aware training, and cache adaptation. Organized around a taxonomy of 100+ dynamic events, we build a camera-annotated training mixture combining VLM-filtered real videos, generated hard dynamics, synthetic camera loops, and memory-interruption augmentations. Each clip is converted into a frame graph with protected anchors, degraded intervals, and explicit temporal gaps. A node-structured curriculum, including node-drop, noisy memory, frontier continuation, and reference-cache training, forces the model to retrieve relevant past states across interruptions rather than relying solely on local continuity. PM-RoPE, an elegant camera-phase RoPE extension, unlocks spatiotemporal retrieval at a single-attention cost while preserving pretrained pathways. ReMind achieves the best overall scores on STEVO-Bench and recovery tasks. Furthermore, general image-to-video evaluations confirm this curriculum avoids catastrophic forgetting. We will open-source our code, data, and models.

</details>


### [151] [Dual-Pathway Geometry-Aware MLLM for Spatial Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25334)
*Yufei Zheng,Xuhan Zhu,Zide Liu,Chunpeng Zhou,Chenfeng Wang,Yongchao Xu,Yunnan Wang,Jiawei Liu,Pengfei Yu,Wei Zhai,Yang Cao,Zheng-Jun Zha*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GAMSI提出了一种双路径几何感知多模态大模型，仅以RGB图像为输入，通过Metric-Structure Decoupled Queries (MSDQ) 分别提取密集度量信号和稀疏结构线索，配合Expert-Guided Visual Grounding (EVG) 模块将聚合线索投影回视觉特征，在统一自回归骨干网络中内化两种几何先验，并在七个空间智能基准上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM要么只关注3D结构感知（如点云），要么只关注度量尺度估计（如深度图），且依赖额外模型输入导致计算开销大、泛化受限。缺乏一个仅以RGB为输入、同时内化两种几何先验的统一框架。

Method: 1) 提出Metric-Structure Decoupled Queries (MSDQ)，用两组可学习查询分别提取密集度量信号和稀疏结构线索，配合任务解耦注意力掩码防止干扰；2) 设计Expert-Guided Visual Grounding (EVG) 模块将聚合线索投影回帧级视觉特征，与视觉基础模型对齐（仅作为训练监督）；3) 构建多任务空间指令微调数据集MTS（152,776样本，13任务类型，3种视觉模态）；4) 采用两阶段课程训练。

Result: 在七个空间智能基准上达到最先进（SOTA）性能。

Conclusion: 仅以RGB图像为输入、通过解耦查询和专家引导接地机制，可以高效内化两种互补的几何知识（3D结构感知和度量尺度估计），显著提升空间智能水平。

Abstract: Spatial understanding of the physical world from 2D visual inputs hinges on two complementary forms of geometric knowledge: holistic 3D structural perception and fine-grained metric scale estimation. Existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) typically address only one facet, ingesting either depth maps or point clouds as additional model inputs, which incurs substantial computational overhead and inherits the generalization limitations of upstream prediction models. We propose GAMSI, a dual-pathway Geometry-Aware MLLM for Spatial Intelligence that takes only RGB images as input while internalizing both forms of geometric prior within a unified autoregressive backbone. Specifically, we introduce Metric-Structure Decoupled Queries (MSDQ) which employ two groups of learnable queries to respectively extract dense metric signals and sparse structural cues from the shared visual context, with a task-decoupled attention mask further preventing the two pathways from contaminating each other. Building on this, an Expert-Guided Visual Grounding (EVG) module projects the aggregated cues back to frame-level visual features and aligns them with vision foundation models, which serve purely as training-time supervision, rather than as model inputs. We further build a multi-task spatial instruction-tuning dataset (MTS) comprising 152{,}776 samples spanning 13 task types and three visual modalities, consolidated from six public datasets. Trained with a two-stage curriculum, GAMSI achieves state-of-the-art performance on seven spatial intelligence benchmarks.

</details>


### [152] [Toward Native Multimodal Modeling: A Roadmap](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25343)
*Siyu An,Junru Lu,Junnan Dong,Qiufeng Wang,Yinghui Li,Weizhi Fei,Zichao Yu,Zheng Yuan,Biao Liu,Haopeng Wang,Renzhao Liang,Yixuan Yang,Yunhang Shen,Bo Ke,Keyu Chen,Linhao Luo,Difan Zou,Xiao Huang,Di Yin,Ruizhi Qiao,Xing Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文系统梳理了从非原生多模态建模向原生多模态建模（NMM）的转型路线图，定义了架构原生性（区分中融合与早融合vs非原生范式），按输入-输出对偶性将现有模型分为三类（多到文本、多到目标、多到多），并从工业视角全面剖析了统一Transformer范式的端到端流程，包括架构协调、数据策展、训练推理及评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态建模是从模态无关推理迈向世界模型的关键一步，但原生多模态架构的设计空间尚未被充分定义，缺乏系统化的转型路线图。

Method: 形式化定义架构原生性，区分中融合/早融合与非原生范式；基于输入-输出对偶性将原生模型分为三类（Multi-to-Text、Multi-to-Target、Multi-to-Multi）；从工业视角系统拆解端到端管道的五个方面。

Result: 提出了一个正式定义的原生多模态建模路线图，并对现有原生模型进行了系统分类与工业级分析。

Conclusion: 该工作为社区提供了从非原生向原生多模态建模转型的清晰架构框架和工业实践指南，推动理解与生成在统一Transformer范式中的无缝共存。

Abstract: Multimodal modeling represents a vital step from modality-agnostic reasoning toward world modeling. While early approaches predominantly rely on late-fusion that assembles encoders and frozen language backbones with output heads, recent efforts have shifted the paradigm toward native multimodal modeling (NMM) with the intrinsic integration of modalities for superior multimodal performance. Despite its potential, the design space of native architectures remains insufficiently defined. In this paper, we present the community with a formalized roadmap for this transition. Specifically, we formally define the architectural nativity, distinguishing mid-fusion and early-fusion from non-native paradigms. We further organize the existing native models through the lens of input-output duality into three categories: (i) Multi-to-Text for cross-modal comprehension with text-only output; (ii) Multi-to-Target for scenario-oriented generation, e.g., image, audio and video generation, and (iii) Multi-to-Multi for unified modeling with symmetric input-output. We deliver a comprehensive and industrial-grade investigation into the transition toward the definitive NMM framework, where understanding and generation seamlessly coexist within a unified transformer paradigm. We systematically unpack the end-to-end pipeline from industrial perspectives from architectural coordination, massive data curation, to full-stack training recipes, inference & deployment, and the comprehensive evaluation for truly native modeling.

</details>


### [153] [ERNIE-Image Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25347)
*Jiaxiang Liu,Zhida Feng,Pengyu Zou,Zhenyu Qian,Tianrui Zhu,Jun Xia,Yuehu Dong,Yanzheng Lin,Honglin Xiong,Anqi Chen,Yunpeng Ding,Jinghui Duan,Lin Gao,Chao Han,Tiechao He,Jiakang Hu,Ranjun Hua,Xueming Jiang,Qingli Kong,Yuting Lei,Tianyu Li,Yunlin Liu,Changling Liu,Yaxin Liu,Yi Liu,Xuguang Liu,Xiaolong Ma,Yan Pan,Yiran Ren,Nan Sheng,Yu Sun,Siyang Sun,Yixiang Tu,Yang Wan,Huanai Wang,Siqi Wang,Yang Wu,Youzhi Yang,Xiaowen Yang,Jianwen Yang,Yehua Yang,Quanwen Zhang,Xinmin Zhang,Haoxin Zhang,Xiang Zhang,Jun Zhang,Qian Zhang,Qiao Zhao,Qi Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ERNIE-Image是一个基于8B单流DiT架构的开源文本到图像生成模型，通过更有效的预训练数据挖掘和改进的监督质量，弥合了开源模型与闭源系统之间的差距。它在预训练中采用自底向上的数据构建管道，在后期训练中使用自顶向下的数据构建管道，并提出了ERNIE-Image-Turbo、MT-DMD、Prompt Enhancer和ERNIE-Image-Aes等配套组件，在指令跟随、文本渲染和美学质量方面达到领先水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前开源文本到图像生成模型与领先的闭源系统之间存在明显的性能差距，主要限制因素在于大规模预训练数据的有效挖掘不足以及训练过程中的监督质量不够高。

Method: 1）预训练阶段：采用自底向上的数据构建管道，结合细粒度图像分类、丰富描述标注、美学评估和分层采样；2）后期训练阶段：采用自顶向下的数据构建管道，多样化提示注释，应用稳定化DPO策略；3）提出MT-DMD方法用于缓解蒸馏过程中的能力漂移；4）配备轻量级Prompt Enhancer扩展用户意图。

Result: ERNIE-Image在开源模型中达到领先性能，在指令跟随、文本渲染和美学质量方面接近顶级商业模型。同时发布了ERNIE-Image-Turbo（8-NFE高效生成）、ERNIE-Image-Aes美学模型和ERNIE-Image-Aes-1K基准。

Conclusion: ERNIE-Image成功弥合了开源生成模型与闭源系统之间的差距，其数据构建策略和训练方法具有实用价值，已开源模型和美学资源以促进AIGC社区发展。

Abstract: We introduce ERNIE-Image, an open-source text-to-image generation model built upon an 8B single-stream DiT architecture. ERNIE-Image aims to bridge the gap between current open-source models and leading closed-source systems through more effective mining of large-scale pre-training data and improved supervision quality throughout training. During pre-training, we adopt a bottom-up data construction pipeline that combines fine-grained image categorization, rich caption annotation, aesthetic assessment, and hierarchical sampling. This strategy reduces data noise while preserving long-tail concepts and detailed real-world knowledge, providing a stronger foundation for complex generation tasks. In the post-training stage, we use a top-down data construction pipeline for high-demand scenarios, diversify prompt annotations to better match real user inputs, and apply a stabilized DPO strategy to align the model with human aesthetic preferences. We further train ERNIE-Image-Turbo for efficient 8-NFE generation and propose MT-DMD to mitigate capability drift during distillation. To make the model easier to use in practical scenarios, we equip it with a lightweight Prompt Enhancer that expands concise user intents into structured visual descriptions. In addition, we develop ERNIE-Image-Aes, an industrial-grade aesthetic model, together with ERNIE-Image-Aes-1K, a human-annotated benchmark for realistic aesthetic evaluation. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments show that ERNIE-Image achieves leading performance among open-source models and approaches top-tier commercial models in instruction following, text rendering, and aesthetic quality. We release the trained models and aesthetic resources to facilitate further academic research and technical progress in the AIGC community.

</details>


### [154] [MARVEL: Universal Murray's Law-informed Vessel Tree Segmentation and Topology Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25363)
*Yi Zhou,Thiara Sana Ahmed,Jacqueline Chua,Meng Wang,Qinrong Zhang,Alejandro F. Frangi,Huazhu Fu,Jun Cheng,Leopold Schmetterer,Bingyao Tan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出MARVEL框架，将生物物理约束（Murray定律）融入血管分割与拓扑估计，在八个数据集上验证其优于基线模型的分割精度、拓扑一致性和生理合理性，并在高血压分类任务中展现出显著的临床价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习血管分割方法忽视Murray定律等生物物理约束，导致分割结果存在生理上不合理的分支结构和误分类，无法可靠用于下游临床任务（如血流模拟、疾病量化）。

Method: 提出MARVEL框架：1) 结合逐像素监督与显式半径预测；2) 利用经验宽度-指数映射推导局部分叉约束；3) 将这些约束实现为可微正则化项，在训练过程中引导模型生成生理一致的分割结果。

Result: 在八个公开数据集（涵盖多种血管模态与分割骨干网络）上，MARVEL在分割精度、拓扑一致性和生理合理性方面均表现优越。在高血压分类任务中，通过动静脉压差显著提升分类效果（p < 0.001），优于基线模型。

Conclusion: MARVEL通过将生物物理先验嵌入血管提取过程，有效提升了分割结果的生理合理性，并证明了其在临床疾病分类（如高血压）中的预测价值。

Abstract: Vascular circulation follows fundamental biophysical principles that optimize mass transport and metabolic energy expenditure, which can be effectively modeled by Murray's law. However, contemporary deep learning methods for vascular segmentation often neglect these biophysical constraints. This leads to physiologically implausible branching and misclassification vascular trees, rendering. These automated segmentation results are unreliable unreliable for downstream clinical tasks such as blood flow simulation or disease quantification. In this paper, we introduce MARVEL (Universal MurrAy's law-infoRmed Vessel sEgmentation and topoLogy estimation), a backbone-agnostic framework that integrates biophysical priors into vascular tree extraction. MARVEL combines per-pixel supervision with explicit radius predictions to enforce local bifurcation constraints derived from an empirical width-exponent mapping. We implement these constraints as differentiable regularizers during training to guide models toward physiologically consistent reconstructions. We evaluate MARVEL on eight public datasets across multiple vascular modalities and segmentation backbones. Results demonstrate MARVEL's superior performance in segmentation accuracy, topological consistency, and physiological plausibility. By converting segmented masks into graph-based hemodynamic simulations, we demonstrate that MARVEL preserves the subtle pathological narrowing and topological connectivity required to distinguish hypertensive from normotensive eyes. Results show that MARVEL significantly improves the classification of hypertension via arteriovenous pressure differences in the eye (p < 0.001), outperforming baseline models in both topological consistency and clinical predictive value.

</details>


### [155] [Can MLLMs Reason Beyond Language? VisReason: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Vision-Centric Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25364)
*Longteng Guo,Yifan Wang,Pengkang Huo,Tailai Chen,Yuze Wu,Jing Liu,Xinxin Zhu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出 VisReason 基准，用于评估多模态大模型在视觉中心推理（而非语言推理）上的能力，包含 1,505 道题，涵盖感知、结构和概念三个层次的推理，揭示人类与当前模型之间的显著差距，并发现测试时推理策略带来的收益有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 MLLM 在视觉推理基准上表现强劲，但难以区分其推理是真正基于视觉证据，还是依赖语言先验。因此需要一个聚焦于视觉中心推理的基准来诊断模型能力。

Method: 构建 VisReason 基准，包含 1,505 个问题，覆盖 10 个类别，分属感知、结构和概念推理三个层次，并在人类与多个 MLLM 上进行比较评估。

Result: VisReason 对现有 MLLM 构成质的不同挑战，人类与模型之间存在显著差距，且测试时推理策略（如思维链）带来的提升非常有限。

Conclusion: VisReason 是一个有效的诊断工具，用于评估超越语言能力的视觉中心推理，揭示了当前多模态大模型的根本局限。

Abstract: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance on visual reasoning benchmarks, yet it remains unclear to what extent such performance reflects reasoning directly grounded in visual evidence. We introduce VisReason, a benchmark for vision-centric reasoning in everyday scenarios where perception and inference are tightly coupled. VisReason contains 1,505 questions across 10 categories spanning perceptual, structural, and conceptual reasoning. Our evaluation shows that VisReason poses a qualitatively different challenge from existing benchmarks, exposing substantial gaps between humans and current MLLMs and revealing limited benefits from test-time reasoning strategies. VisReason offers a focused diagnostic for evaluating vision-centric reasoning beyond language.

</details>


### [156] [Physics-Aware 3D Gaussian Editing for Driving Scene Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25373)
*Feng Zhou,Jian Zhang,Yuhang Sun,He Wang,Qiong Wen,Debao Kong,Tieru Wu,Rui Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RoVES是一个面向自动驾驶场景的物理感知3D高斯编辑系统，支持单图驱动的道路几何编辑（如减速带、凹陷路面）并耦合四自由度半车动力学模型实现车辆位姿校正，无需优化即可在1.84秒内完成道路插入，全程仅需6.24秒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3DGS场景编辑方法对道路几何编辑支持有限，且未能将道路编辑与合理的车辆-道路相互作用动力学耦合，难以生成极端驾驶场景下的训练数据或评估系统在道路不规则条件下的可靠性。同时，现有方法要么需要分钟级别的逐编辑优化，要么仅关注外观级或物体级操作，缺乏物理感知的道路不规则编辑能力。

Method: RoVES采用单图驱动的道路几何插入，结合4-DOF半车车辆动力学模型实现物理感知的车辆位姿校正（垂直位移和俯仰角）。通过一次性无优化管线（1.84秒）插入道路元素，并通过颜色迁移和基于车辆动力学的位姿校正（总计6.24秒）完成全流程，逐帧校正车辆位姿以逼近动力学一致的垂直位移和俯仰响应。

Result: 在Waymo数据集上的实验表明，RoVES具有实用的效率和具有竞争力的视觉一致性，适用于物理感知的驾驶场景生成。

Conclusion: RoVES有效解决了自动驾驶场景中道路几何编辑与车辆-道路动力学耦合的难题，提供了一种高效、物理一致的场景编辑方案，可用于生成极端驾驶场景下的训练数据。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has shown great potential in autonomous driving simulation and data generation, enabling photorealistic reconstruction and flexible scene manipulation. However, existing 3DGS scene editing methods have limited support for road geometry editing (e.g., inserting speed humps or sunken roads), and generally do not couple such edits with plausible vehicle-road interaction dynamics. Such editing is essential for generating training data under extreme driving scenarios or evaluating system reliability under these road irregularities. Moreover, many optimization-based methods require minutes of per-edit refinement, while existing efficient alternatives mainly focus on appearance-level or object-level manipulation rather than physics-aware road irregularity editing. To address these limitations, we propose RoVES, a Road-and-Vehicle Editing System for physics-aware 3D Gaussian editing in driving scenes. RoVES enables single-image-driven road geometry insertion and couples the edited road profile with a 4-DOF half-car vehicle dynamics model to achieve physics-aware vehicle pose correction in vertical displacement and pitch. RoVES inserts road elements in a one-shot, optimization-free pipeline (1.84s), and the full pipeline (including color transfer and vehicle-dynamics-based pose correction) completes in 6.24s; it edits dynamic vehicles via pose editing and corrects poses frame-by-frame to approximate dynamics-consistent vertical displacement and pitch responses. Experiments on the Waymo dataset show that RoVES provides practical efficiency and competitive visual consistency for physics-aware driving scene generation.

</details>


### [157] [Adversarial Orthogonal Disentanglement for LVLM Hallucination Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25377)
*Ruoxi Cheng,Haoxuan Ma,Zhengfei Hai,Yiyan Huang,Ranjie Duan,Tianle Zhang,Xu Yang,Ziyi Ye,Xingjun Ma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出对抗正交解缠（AOD）框架，通过学习与幻觉相关的潜在方向，实现无需额外训练的解码策略，有效抑制大型视觉语言模型中的幻觉，同时保持通用能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LVLM幻觉缓解方法要么依赖昂贵的外部干预（指令微调、检索），要么内部机制受限于有缺陷的注意力权重和纠缠的隐藏表示。需要一种轻量、高效的几何框架来解决幻觉问题。

Method: 提出对抗正交解缠（AOD），通过最小最大目标学习幻觉相关方向：分类器将幻觉信号集中到投影分量，对抗器通过梯度反转层从正交残差空间中移除幻觉信号。基于该方向实现无训练的双前向对比解码策略。

Result: 在三个LVLM上，POPE准确率平均提升6%以上，AMBER提升6%，同时保持MMMU等实用任务的强性能。表现出跨数据集的稳健迁移能力。

Conclusion: AOD通过捕获通用幻觉相关偏差而非数据集特定伪影，实现了有效的幻觉抑制与通用能力保持之间的平衡，是一种轻量且可迁移的解决方案。

Abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have advanced multimodal understanding, yet their reliability is limited by hallucination, where generated content conflicts with visual facts. Existing mitigation methods either rely on costly external interventions, such as instruction tuning and retrieval, or use internal mechanisms that remain limited by flawed attention weights and entangled hidden representations. We propose Adversarial Orthogonal Disentanglement (AOD), a latent geometric framework for mitigating LVLM hallucinations. AOD learns a hallucination-related direction through a minimax objective: a classifier concentrates hallucination signals into the projected component, while an adversary removes them from the orthogonal residual space via a Gradient Reversal Layer. The learned direction enables a training-free dual-forward-pass contrastive decoding strategy that suppresses hallucinations while preserving general capabilities. Experiments on three LVLMs across four hallucination and four utility benchmarks show that AOD consistently outperforms strong baselines. It improves POPE accuracy by over 6\% on average, boosts AMBER by 6\%, and maintains strong performance on utility tasks such as MMMU. Further analysis shows robust transfer across datasets, suggesting that AOD captures general hallucination-related biases rather than dataset-specific artifacts. Our source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/Hunter-Wrynn/AOD.

</details>


### [158] [CollectionLoRA: Collecting 50 Effects in 1 LoRA via Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25378)
*Fangtai Wu,Hailong Guo,Shijie Huang,Jiayi Song,Yubo Huang,Mushui Liu,Zhao Wang,Yunlong Yu,Jiaming Liu,Ruihua Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CollectionLoRA通过多教师在线蒸馏框架，将多达50种不同效果的LoRA和少步生成能力整合到单个LoRA中，解决了参数干扰和部署开销问题，同时保持概念保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有定制化图像编辑方法使用LoRA存储多种效果时，部署开销大、动态加载效率低；且与加速模块级联会导致参数干扰，引发概念混淆和风格退化。

Method: 提出CollectionLoRA框架，包含三个核心组件：(i) 概率双流路由机制，训练时随机切换数据源以增强泛化；(ii) 非对称正交提示策略，在提示空间中实现概念隔离；(iii) 由粗到细的蒸馏目标，缩小师生模型分布差距。

Result: 实验表明，CollectionLoRA成功将多种定制化效果和少步生成能力蒸馏进单个LoRA，在降低部署开销的同时，概念保真度达到甚至超过独立训练的教师模型。

Conclusion: CollectionLoRA有效解决了多LoRA部署中的参数干扰和存储开销问题，通过蒸馏技术实现了高效、高保真的定制化图像编辑。

Abstract: Customized image editing aims to equip pre-trained diffusion models with specific visual effects using limited paired data, typically via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). As the number of desired effects grows, storing and dynamically loading numerous these effect LoRAs significantly increases deployment overhead. Furthermore, current pipelines typically cascade these effect LoRAs with acceleration modules for fast generation, which triggers severe parameter interference and results in concept bleeding and style degradation. We propose CollectionLoRA, a multi-teacher on-policy distillation framework capable of distilling the concepts of up to 50 different effect LoRAs along with few-step generation capabilities into a single LoRA. This fundamentally resolves the feature interference issue and significantly reduces deployment costs. Specifically, the method introduces (i) a Probabilistic Dual-Stream Routing mechanism that enables the model to randomly switch between data sources during training, effectively enhancing its generalization in unseen scenarios; (ii) an Asymmetric Orthogonal Prompting strategy to achieve concept isolation within the prompt space; (iii) a Coarse-to-Fine Distillation Objective to mitigate the distribution gap between the teacher and student models. Extensive evaluations show that CollectionLoRA distills all customized effects and few-step generation into a single LoRA, reducing deployment overhead while achieving concept fidelity comparable to or better than independently trained teacher models.

</details>


### [159] [Weakly Supervised Camouflaged Object Detection Based on the SAM Model and Mask Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25385)
*Xia Li,Xinran Liu,Lin Qi,Junyu Dong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种弱监督伪装目标检测方法MGNet，通过级联掩码解码器、上下文增强模块和掩码引导特征聚合模块，结合BoxSAM利用SAM生成伪标签，在减少标注成本的同时取得与全监督方法竞争的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全监督伪装目标检测方法需要像素级标注，成本高；而弱监督方法由于使用粗糙标注导致性能下降。本文旨在提出一种新的弱监督方法，在降低标注成本的同时提升检测精度，解决边缘模糊和漏检问题。

Method: 1) 提出MGNet，包含级联掩码解码器(CMD)引导分割过程；2) 引入上下文增强模块(CEM)减少漏检；3) 设计掩码引导特征聚合模块(MFAM)进行有效特征聚合；4) 提出BoxSAM，利用SAM和边界框提示通过冗余处理策略生成高质量伪标签。

Result: 实验表明，该方法在多个指标上达到了与当前最先进方法相竞争的性能，有效平衡了标注效率与检测精度。

Conclusion: 本文提出的弱监督伪装目标检测方法通过精心设计的模块和伪标签生成策略，成功克服了弱监督方法的性能瓶颈，为伪装目标检测领域提供了一种兼顾标注效率与检测精度的有效方案。

Abstract: Camouflaged object detection (COD) from a single image is a challenging task due to the high similarity between objects and their surroundings. Existing fully supervised methods require labor-intensive pixel-level annotations, making weakly supervised methods a viable compromise that balances accuracy and annotation efficiency. However, weakly supervised methods often experience performance degradation due to the use of coarse annotations. In this paper, we introduce a new weakly supervised approach for camouflaged object detection to overcome these limitations. Specifically, we propose a novel network, MGNet, which tackles edge ambiguity and missed detections by utilizing initial masks generated by our custom-designed Cascaded Mask Decoder (CMD) to guide the segmentation process and enhance edge predictions. We introduce a Context Enhancement Module(CEM) to reduce the missing detection, and a Mask-guided Feature Aggregation Module (MFAM) for effective feature aggregation. For the weak supervision challenge, we propose BoxSAM, which leverages the Segment Anything Model (SAM) with bounding-box prompts to generate pseudo-labels. By employing a redundant processing strategy, high quality pixel-level pseudo-labels are provided for training MGNet. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method delivers competitive performance against current state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [160] [Subspace-Guided Semantic and Topological Invariant Registration for Annotation-Free Ultrasound Plane Quality Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25396)
*Chunzheng Zhu,Jianxin Lin,Feng Wang,Cheng Jiang,Guanghua Tan,Zhenyu Zhou,Shengli Li,Kenli Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: STRIQ 提出无需标注的超声图像质量控制框架，通过潜在注册对齐器（LRA）建立层级特征对应，利用正交知识子空间（OKS）分解平面特异性表征，在无标注条件下达到与临床质量评分的最优相关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有超声图像质量控制方法过度依赖逐平面标注或伪标签，后者在临床采集的空间形变下易产生系统性偏差，亟需一种无需标注、鲁棒的质量评估方案。

Method: 1. Latent Registration Aligner (LRA)：建立查询图像与方差驱动锚点间的层级特征空间对应；2. 方差光谱准则自主从无标注数据中蒸馏结构稳定的原型锚点；3. Orthogonal Knowledge Subspace (OKS)：将平面特定表征分解为相互正交的子空间，避免知识迁移中的干扰。

Result: 在 in-house US4QA 和公开 CAMUS 数据集上，STRIQ 与临床质量评分的相关性达到 SOTA。

Conclusion: STRIQ 建立了无标注、实时可靠的超声质量控制新范式，代码已开源。

Abstract: Reliable quality control (QC) of ultrasound images is essential for both real-time acquisition guidance and retrospective clinical audit, yet existing approaches rely heavily on per-plane annotations, or employ pseudo-labeling prone to systematic bias under spatial deformations inherent in clinical acquisition. We present STRIQ, a registration-driven framework that recasts annotation-free US plane quality control as a subspace-guided consistency measurement problem. Specifically, STRIQ introduces a Latent Registration Aligner (LRA) to establish hierarchical feature space correspondences between query images and variance-driven anchors, which are autonomously distilled from unlabeled data via a variance spectrum criterion to serve as structurally stable prototypes. To further disambiguate anatomical planes and mitigate negative knowledge transfer, we propose an Orthogonal Knowledge Subspace (OKS) module. The OKS decomposes plane-specific representations into mutually orthogonal subspaces, enabling fine-grained expert collaboration while preventing inter-plane interference, ensuring that the quality metric is grounded in principled subspace proximity. Extensive experiments on the in-house US4QA and public CAMUS datasets demonstrate that STRIQ achieves state-of-the-art correlation with clinical quality scores, establishing a new paradigm for annotation-free, real-time reliable ultrasound quality control. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhcz328/STRIQ.

</details>


### [161] [Anatomy-Anchored Self-Supervision: Distilling Vision Foundation Models for Invariant Ultrasound Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25402)
*Chunzheng Zhu,Yijun Wang,Jianxin Lin,Feng Wang,Hongwei Wang,Lei Zhao,Shengli Li,Kenli Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出ANAUS框架，利用解剖锚点进行超声图像自监督预训练，通过LP-SAM模块实现无标注解剖分割，结合双重自监督策略（跨视图语义感知解剖分离对齐+上下文核心区域预测），在6个公共数据集上超越SOTA方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有超声图像自监督方法仅在图像或帧级别操作，忽略了解剖上下文，无法学习临床对齐的表征。本文旨在将表征学习从通用视觉区域转移到临床有意义的解剖结构上。

Method: 1) 提出LP-SAM模块，利用可学习潜在提示引擎+一次性域自适应，实现无标注的解剖分割；2) 提出双重自监督学习范式：跨视图语义感知解剖分离对齐（同一解剖区特征不变性+不同结构间可区分性）和上下文核心区域预测（重建损坏区域以捕获细粒度结构细节）。

Result: 在6个公共数据集上一致超越当前SOTA方法，同时保持临床部署所需的计算效率。

Conclusion: 解剖锚定的自监督预训练能有效提升超声图像表征学习的临床对齐性，且无需额外标注成本，具有良好的部署效率。

Abstract: Self-supervised pre-training paradigm has gained increasing prominence for learning transferable representations in medical imaging, yet existing methods for ultrasound (US) images operate at the image or frame level, overlooking the anatomical context for clinical-aligned representation learning. In this work, we propose an anatomy-anchored ultrasound self-supervision framework ANAUS that shifts representation learning from generic visual regions to clinically meaningful anatomical structures. Utilizing a learnable latent prompt engine alongside a one-time domain adaptation on existing public image--mask pairs, we empower the LP-SAM module to achieve annotation-free anatomy delineation at scale. Building upon this anatomical grounding, we propose a dual-policy self-supervised learning paradigm consisting of inter-view semantics-aware anatomy-separating alignment and contextual core-region prediction to enhance representation learning. Specifically, the former enforces feature invariance within identical anatomical regions while promoting discriminability across distinct structures; the latter compels the model to reconstruct corrupted regions, thereby capturing fine-grained structural details. Extensive evaluations on six public datasets demonstrate that \ours{} consistently outstrips current state-of-the-art methods while maintaining the computational efficiency essential for clinical deployment. Code is available at https://github.com/zhcz328/ANAUS.

</details>


### [162] [Towards Active Real-to-Twin Inspection: A New Paradigm for Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25407)
*Jiaxuan Liu,Yunkang Cao,Yufeng Chen,Chunyang Li,Yuhuan Du,Hui Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Real-to-Twin异常检测新任务，通过AVATAR框架实现零样本异常检测，利用CAD数字孪生作为几何匹配参考，在无缺陷标注下有效定位多样异常。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本异常检测严重依赖被动、固定视角的2D图像，无法适应实际工业巡检中主动、动态的观测需求，亟需突破这一瓶颈。

Method: 提出AVATAR框架，通过仅使用无缺陷的图像-CAD对，学习真实图像与数字孪生之间的鲁棒语义对齐，弥合Sim2Real域差距，将CAD先验转化为动态无异常参考，从而将异常检测转化为不可对齐偏差的零样本定位问题。

Result: 在大量实验中，AVATAR显著优于改进的最先进基线方法，对严重的视角变化表现出极强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: AVATAR成功将被动2D异常检测拓展至主动动态观测场景，为工业巡检中数字孪生的实用化提供了有效范式。

Abstract: The deployment of zero-shot anomaly detection (AD) in embodied industrial inspection is severely bottlenecked by its reliance on passive, fixed-viewpoint 2D imagery. Such formulations inherently fail to accommodate the active, dynamic observations required in real-world environments. To break this limitation, we introduce Real-to-Twin Anomaly Detection, a novel task that evaluates physical observations directly against geometrically matched CAD Digital Twins. To tackle this new task, we propose AVATAR, a framework designed to learn robust semantic alignment between Real and Digital Twins. By bridging benign Sim2Real domain gaps using only defect-free pairs, AVATAR effectively transforms CAD priors into dynamic, anomaly-free references. This elegant formulation enables the model to localize diverse anomalies in a zero-shot manner as unalignable deviations, eliminating the need for defect annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AVATAR substantially outperforms adapted state-of-the-art baselines, exhibiting exceptional robustness to severe viewpoint variations. The code and dataset will be made publicly available.

</details>


### [163] [MTLLFM: Multimodal-Temporal Laughter Localization: UR-FUNNY-Temporal and SMILE-Temporal Benchmarks with an Adaptive Multimodal Fusion Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25409)
*Eyal Hanania,Nadav Kirsch,Daniel Arkushin,Jonathan Benvenisti,Amos Bercovich,Elie Zemmour,Sahar Froim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出两个贡献：1）构建了两个带精确时间边界标注的笑声数据集（UR-FUNNY-Temporal 和 SMILE-Temporal，覆盖11,053个视频，78.8小时）；2）提出轻量级弱监督时序笑声定位框架，结合HuBERT和MAE编码器、时序softmax池化和自适应模态门控，仅需片段级标签即可实现细粒度定位。在体育广播数据上达到99% F1和68.1%定位精度，时间标签使下游笑声推理CIDEr提升227%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有笑声检测方法将问题简化为粗粒度的片段级分类，无法捕捉短暂、瞬态笑声事件的精确时间边界。

Method: 1）构建UR-FUNNY-Temporal和SMILE-Temporal数据集，提供精确起始/结束边界、说话者/观众区分、模态主导性和强度标注；2）提出弱监督框架，由固定HuBERT和MAE编码器、时序softmax池化和自适应模态门控组成，仅使用片段级标签进行训练。

Result: 在体育广播数据上达到99% F1和68.1%定位精度；在各数据集上显著优于Gemini 3 Flash等多模态基础模型；消融实验验证各组件有效性；精确时间标签使GPT-3.5在笑声推理CIDEr上提升227%，超越GPT-4o。

Conclusion: 弱监督时序笑声定位方法有效且高效，精确的时间边界标注对下游推理任务有显著提升作用，代码和数据集已公开。

Abstract: Detecting laughter in video is essential for affective computing and narrative understanding, yet existing approaches treat it as coarse clip-level classification, failing to capture precise temporal boundaries of brief, transient laughter events. We address this gap with two complementary contributions.
  First, we introduce UR-FUNNY-Temporal and SMILE-Temporal, fully annotated temporal laughter datasets extending two widely-used humor benchmarks. Our annotations cover over 11,053 videos (78.8 hours) and provide precise onset/offset boundaries for each laughter event, along with rich metadata distinguishing speaker vs. audience laughter, modality dominance (acoustic, visual, or both), and intensity levels.
  Second, we propose a lightweight weakly-supervised framework for temporal laughter localization. Our architecture combines fixed HuBERT and MAE encoders with temporal softmax pooling and adaptive modality gating, learning fine-grained temporal grounding from clip-level labels without requiring frame-level annotations during training. Experiments across three datasets demonstrate that our approach substantially outperforms multimodal foundation models including Gemini 3 Flash, achieving 99% F1 and 68.1% localization precision on sports broadcast data. Ablations validate each architectural component. Furthermore, our precise temporal tags improve downstream laughter reasoning by 227% on CIDEr, enabling GPT-3.5 to outperform GPT-4o. The code, UR-FUNNY-Temporal and SMILE-Temporal datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/WSCSports/MTLLFM-temporal-laughter-localization.

</details>


### [164] [Generating 3D models from sketches of human faces using a combined approach of Convolutional Neural Networks, Procedural Modeling, and Contour Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25418)
*Nancy Iskander*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合表情检测和3D模型生成的新方法，利用CNN、参数化3D人脸模型(Valley Girl)和Active Snake Contours，首次通过CNN从素描中检测FACS动作单元来识别表情，并将表情映射到3D模型上，再通过Active Snake Contours调整模型以匹配素描轮廓。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人脸素描生成3D模型可以极大简化专业和业余3D艺术家的面部建模过程，且观察到面部表情会显著改变面部轮廓，因此需要将表情检测与3D生成相结合。

Method: 方法包含三个组件：1) CNN（使用自建数据集训练）检测素描中的FACS动作单元以识别表情；2) 将检测到的表情映射到参数化3D人脸模型Valley Girl上；3) 使用Active Snake Contours计算变换参数，填补模型与素描之间的轮廓差距。

Result: 首次在文献中实现了通过CNN从素描中检测FACS动作单元，并成功将检测到的表情迁移到3D模型，再利用Active Snake Contours优化模型轮廓以匹配输入素描。

Conclusion: 该方法为从素描生成带表情的3D人脸模型提供了新的解决方案，融合了深度学习与传统计算机视觉技术，在专业和业余3D建模场景中具有应用潜力。

Abstract: Generating 3D models from face sketches is an active topic of research in Computer Graphics due to its potential to tremendously facilitate the modeling of faces for both professional 3D arists and novices. Motivated by the observation that facial expressions are responsible for significantly altering and shaping the contours in our faces, we combine both expression detection and 3D model generation in our approach. The result is a novel approach to generating 3D models from sketches which relies on three components: Convolutional Neural Networks, a parametric 3D face model (Valley Girl), and Active Snake Contours. For the first time in the literature, CNNs are trained (using our own generated dataset) to detect the expression in the given sketch through detecting the active FACS Action Units. The expression is then duplicated on Valley Girl to obtain a 3D model with a similar expression. Active Snake Contours are then used to find the transforms needed to close the gaps between that model and the given sketch.

</details>


### [165] [Binding Visual Features Point by Point](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25427)
*Udith Haputhanthri,Declan Campbell,Rim Assouel,Jonathan D. Cohen,Taylor W. Webb*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究探讨了视觉语言模型在多物体场景中存在的"绑定问题"，发现通过文本指向（pointing）可以启发模型内部的串行视觉搜索机制，从而消除绑定错误并实现组合泛化，类似于人类视觉系统中的串行处理策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型在多物体场景中表现不佳，存在无法准确绑定物体特征的"绑定问题"。虽然已有研究提出"指向"方法可以提升性能，但其背后的机制原理尚不清楚，尤其是与人类视觉串行处理的关系有待阐明。

Method: 通过让模型学习通过文本指向来引用物体（pointing-via-text），分析模型内部是否产生串行视觉搜索程序，并通过微调将指向行为泛化到新任务上。

Result: 发现指向学习能诱导模型内部的视觉搜索机制，并表征了支持该过程的底层机制；通过微调可将指向行为泛化到新任务，消除绑定错误，实现组合泛化。

Conclusion: 串行处理能够像在生物视觉系统中一样，为视觉语言模型解决绑定问题，这为理解模型内部机制和提升多物体任务表现提供了原理性证据。

Abstract: Despite success on standard benchmarks, vision language models display persistent failures on tasks involving processing of multi-object scenes, including many tasks that are relatively easy for humans. Recent work has found that these failures may stem from a basic inability to accurately bind object features in-context, a challenge that is referred to as the "binding problem" in cognitive science and neuroscience. The human visual system is thought to solve this binding problem via serial processing, attending to individual objects one at a time so as to avoid interference from other objects. Recent work has proposed "pointing" -- the use of explicit spatial coordinates to refer to objects -- as an analogous solution for vision language models, and found that it improves performance on challenging multi-object tasks. However, it is unclear $\textit{why}$ (i.e., on a mechanistic or representational level) this approach improves performance, and how directly this relates to serial processing in human vision. Here, we investigate this question. We find that learning to point-via-text induces an internal visual search routine, and we characterize the mechanisms that support this procedure. We also find that pointing behavior can be generalized to new tasks via fine-tuning, and that doing so eliminates binding errors and enables compositional generalization. These results provide a proof-of-principle that serial processing can solve the binding problem for vision language models just as it does for biological vision.

</details>


### [166] [Does Seeing More Mean Knowing More? Mono-Anchored Advantage Normalization for Multi-Source Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25437)
*Fanhu Zeng,Zhicong Luo,Zefan Wang,You Li,Chi Chen,Maosong Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出MARS框架，通过单源奖励作为动态锚点，在多源视觉推理中显式建模信息增益与抑制干扰，在GRPO和DAPO上分别提升3.2%和4.9%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于强化学习的视觉推理方法处理多源输入时，只是简单累加信息，缺乏区分信息增益与干扰的机制，尤其在物理属性和语义差异大的模态（如红外与深度）中表现甚至不如单源推理。

Method: 提出MARS框架，以单源奖励作为动态锚点，将多源融合的信息增益显式纳入优势归一化中，在RLVR中自适应地强调模态间的相互促进，同时抑制噪声和冲突。

Result: 在GRPO和DAPO上分别获得3.2%和4.9%的性能提升，在多个数据集上验证了有效性。

Conclusion: MARS通过量化多源融合的信息增益，实现了对模态的一致性调控，有效提升了多源视觉推理性能。

Abstract: Visual reasoning through reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has achieved remarkable progress. However, when dealing with multi-source inputs, existing approaches tend to treat them as a mere accumulation of information, lacking explicit mechanisms to distinguish whether integrating additional sources yields information gain or introduces interference. Therefore, they struggle to effectively model dynamic interaction when integrating multiple sources, particularly when they differ significantly in physical properties and semantics, e.g., infrared and depth, leading to inferior performance to mono-source reasoning when a certain source holds the dominant signal. To address this issue, we propose MARS, a novel mono-anchored multi-source reasoning framework that models each visual modality as an independent information source. Specifically, by treating mono-source rewards as dynamic anchors, our method explicitly incorporates the information gain introduced by multi-source fusion into advantage normalization and adaptively emphasizes mutual promotion between sources while suppressing potential noise or conflicts during RLVR. From theoretical analysis, our method effectively quantifies information gain introduced by multi-source integration in gradient estimation, enabling consistent modality regulation. Empirical results also show impressive 3.2% and 4.9% performance gains on GRPO and DAPO across diverse datasets, confirming effectiveness of our method.

</details>


### [167] [Enhancing Single-Image Facial Demorphing using Multimodal Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25442)
*Nitish Shukla,Arun Ross*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于多模态大语言模型引导的耦合扩散重建框架，实现参考无关的人脸去融合，直接从RGB域联合重建两张原始人脸，避免传统方法的身份信息损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的人脸融合攻击检测方法只能检测出融合图像，但无法恢复原始身份或构成图像，限制了其取证应用价值。

Method: 利用多模态大语言模型中间层的语义嵌入作为条件，引导耦合扩散模型在RGB域联合重建两张原始人脸，通过耦合条件生成问题建模保证身份间一致性。

Result: RGB域去融合相比潜在空间方法在严格操作点提升30-40%；中间MLLM层编码更具身份判别性的表示；完整MLLM嵌入优于原始ViT特征。

Conclusion: 多模态大语言模型的语义结构化能力能有效引导人脸去融合，提升取证效能。

Abstract: Face recognition systems are increasingly vulnerable to morphing attacks, where a composite image is crafted to match multiple identities, enabling unauthorized access and identity fraud. Existing detection methods identify morphed images but cannot recover constituent images or identities, limiting their forensic utility. This paper presents a novel reference-free facial demorphing framework that leverages Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to guide a coupled diffusion-based reconstruction process. Our key innovation lies in extracting semantic embeddings from intermediate MLLM layers to condition the demorphing, providing high-level reasoning about facial attributes and identity cues that complement low-level pixel information. We formulate demorphing as a coupled conditional generation problem, where both constituent faces are synthesized jointly through a denoising diffusion model operating directly in the RGB domain, ensuring inter-identity consistency while preserving fine-grained perceptual details. Unlike prior approaches that rely on compressed latent representations or assume identity overlap between training and testing sets, our method bypasses lossy text generation-reencoding cycles by directly utilizing MLLM hidden states as conditioning signals, enabling the denoising network to attend to subtle visual cues such as hair, background, and facial textures. Ablation studies further reveal that middle MLLM layers encode more identity-discriminative representations, RGB-domain demorphing outperforms latent-space approaches by 30--40\% at strict operating points, and full MLLM embeddings provide substantial advantages over raw ViT features through enhanced semantic structuring from multimodal pretraining.

</details>


### [168] [Pantheon360: Taming Digital Twin Generation via 3D-Aware 360° Video Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25449)
*Ting-Hsuan Chen,Ying-Huan Chen,Tao Tu,Jie-Ying Lee,Cho-Ying Wu,Fangzhou Lin,Hengyuan Zhang,David Paz,Xinyu Huang,Yuliang Guo,Yu-Lun Liu,Yue Wang,Liu Ren*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Pantheon360，一种基于3D感知的360°视频扩散框架，通过显式3D缓存（从稀疏360°输入重建）作为几何支架，实现用户自定义相机路径下的高保真、几何一致的360°视频生成，解决传统透视视频生成器FoV受限导致的跨视角不一致和时间漂移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 透视视频生成器视野狭窄，生成完整数字孪生时需要长轨迹或多视角视频，导致严重的跨视角不一致性和时间漂移问题。360°视频生成因其全景覆盖的自然优势，成为解决该问题的理想方案。

Method: 提出Pantheon360框架：1）从稀疏360°输入重建显式3D缓存作为几何支架；2）扩散模型在此基础上专注于逼真纹理细化；3）支持任意用户自定义相机路径，同时由3D缓存保证全局几何一致性。

Result: 在视觉质量和几何一致性方面均优于现有方法，实现了可靠且灵活的360°场景生成，适用于下游仿真和数字孪生应用。

Conclusion: 显式3D缓存结合扩散模型的方法有效解耦了几何一致性与纹理生成，为数字孪生中的360°视频生成提供了一条实用且效果显著的解决路径。

Abstract: Generating complete digital twins from videos requires precise camera control, global scene coverage, and strict spatial-temporal consistency constraints that remain challenging for perspective video generators due to their limited field of view (FoV). Their narrow FoV forces long or multi-view trajectories, amplifying cross-view inconsistency and temporal drift. We argue that 360° video generation offers a natural solution: panoramic coverage simplifies trajectory design and provides a strong global context for maintaining coherence. We introduce Pantheon360: Taming Digital Twin Generation via 3D-Aware 360° Video Diffusion, a controllable 360° video generation framework that synthesizes high-fidelity videos from sparse 360° inputs. The key idea is an explicit 3D Cache, reconstructed from the input, which serves as a geometric scaffold for any user-defined camera path. This allows the diffusion model to focus on photorealistic texture refinement while the 3D Cache enforces global geometric consistency. Experiments show that Pantheon360 achieves superior visual quality and unmatched geometric coherence, enabling reliable and flexible 360° scene generation for downstream simulation and digital-twin applications.

</details>


### [169] [MetaphorVU: Towards Metaphorical Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25461)
*Zhuoqun Li,Boxi Cao,Guiping Jiang,Fangrui Lv,Ruotong Pan,Jianan Wang,Xiangyu Wu,Hongyu Lin,Yaojie Lu,Yong Du,Ruyin Jia,Liyan,Tingting Gao,Han Li,Xianpei Han,Le Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 首个系统性隐喻视频理解基准MetaphorVU-Bench，发现当前多模态大模型在隐喻理解上远落后人类（主要缺陷为跨域映射），提出基于隐喻知识图谱的推理增强框架MetaphorBoost，显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 隐喻视频理解缺乏系统研究，现有工作大多聚焦于单一场景或浅层理解，缺少全面基准来评估多模态大模型的高阶认知能力及其现实应用潜力。

Method: 1) 构建MetaphorVU-Bench系统基准；2) 分析发现当前MLLMs在隐喻跨域映射上的缺陷；3) 构建隐喻知识图谱作为映射增强；4) 提出推理时增强框架MetaphorBoost。

Result: 当前多模态大模型在隐喻视频理解上远低于人类水平，MetaphorBoost框架在所有模型上实现了一致的性能提升。

Conclusion: 该研究为多模态大模型的隐喻理解能力评估提供了首个系统基准和有效增强方法，为未来高阶认知能力研究奠定基础。

Abstract: Metaphorical videos are prevalent across various real-world scenarios to convey complex ideas, and understanding them typically requires high-order cognitive capabilities. The lack of systematic studies on metaphorical video understanding not only constrains the real-world applicability of MLLMs but also impedes the thorough assessment of their high-order cognitive capabilities. To bridge this gap, we propose MetaphorVU-Bench, the first systematic and comprehensive benchmark dedicated to metaphorical video understanding. Through experiments, we find current MLLMs struggle with accurate metaphorical video understanding, lagging far behind human level, primarily due to defective cross-domain mapping. Motivated by this finding, we construct a metaphor knowledge graph as mapping augmentation and propose MetaphorBoost, an inference-time enhancement framework achieving consistent performance improvement. Our benchmark, analysis, and method provide useful insights and a foundation for future research on advancing MLLMs.

</details>


### [170] [MAIL++: Multi-Modal Bi-directional Agent Layer for Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25479)
*Kaixiang Chen,Pengfei Fang,Hui Xue*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出MAIL和MAIL++，一种将跨模态耦合直接嵌入VLM内部计算模块的参数高效微调方法，通过轻量级智能体层替代全参数微调，在少样本分类和跨域检索任务中超越现有PEFT方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PEFT方法依赖外部辅助模块实现跨模态耦合，导致交互是间接且粗粒度的，与原始VLM结构脱钩，限制了表征表达力。

Method: 冻结VLM主干网络，在核心模块（如LayerNorm）后插入轻量级智能体层以近似全参数微调的更新；提出瓶颈式文本到图像桥接实现跨模态联合优化；MAIL++进一步引入元智能体层和元桥实现双向跨模态交换；推理时所有智能体层可重参数化回冻结主干，保持计算效率。

Result: 在少样本图像分类和少样本通用跨域检索任务中，MAIL和MAIL++一致优于现有SOTA的PEFT方法。

Conclusion: 将跨模态耦合嵌入VLM内部计算模块是提升PEFT效果的有效范式，通过轻量级智能体层即可实现高效且表达力强的参数微调。

Abstract: Adapting large vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP to downstream tasks remains challenging, as full fine-tuning is computationally prohibitive and prone to overfitting in low-data regimes. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) alleviates these issues with lightweight prompt- or adapter-based modules, and cross-modal coupling has proven especially effective by strengthening interactions between vision and language. However, existing coupling mechanisms predominantly rely on external auxiliary modules, leading to indirect, coarse-grained interactions that are structurally decoupled from the original VLM and thus limit representational expressiveness.
  In this paper, we propose Multi-Modal Interactive Agent Layer (MAIL), a PEFT paradigm that embeds cross-modal coupling directly into the intrinsic computation modules of VLMs. MAIL freezes the backbone and inserts lightweight agent layers after core modules, such as LayerNorm, to approximate the parameter updates induced by full fine-tuning. To couple visual and textual streams at this level, we introduce a bottleneck-based text-to-image bridge that jointly optimizes paired agent layers across modalities, coordinating the adaptation of corresponding computation modules. We further present MAIL++, which enables bidirectional cross-modal exchange through a meta agent layer, a meta-text bridge, and a meta-image bridge. At inference time, all agent layers are re-parameterized into the frozen backbone, preserving the original computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on few-shot image classification and few-shot universal cross-domain retrieval demonstrate that MAIL and MAIL++ consistently outperform state-of-the-art PEFT methods.

</details>


### [171] [Test-Time Self-Adaptive Conditioning for Stable Audio-Driven Talking-Head Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25488)
*Zhicheng Zhang,Lei Wang,Yu Zhang,Yongsheng Gao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需训练和参数的测试时自适应条件框架(TT-SAC)，通过在推理阶段将生成器的输出重新编码为更优的条件表示，解决了音频驱动说话头生成中静态参考图像导致的身份漂移和时间不一致问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在推理阶段仅使用单一的静态参考图像来约束整个视频生成过程，导致固定的身份特征与动态面部运动不匹配，产生身份漂移、时间不一致和感知质量下降的问题。

Method: 提出测试时自自适应条件(TT-SAC)，通过将生成器与其编码器组成反馈循环：将生成器的输出重新编码，构建更符合时序动态的精细条件表示。单步自适应近似生成过程的自洽平衡，无需重训练、梯度更新或额外监督。

Result: 在多个最先进的说话头生成器和基准数据集上，在唇形同步准确性、时间连贯性、身份保持和感知保真度方面均取得一致改进。理论分析表明在Lipschitz假设下，该方法降低特征方差并提升生成稳定性，且存在原则性的偏差-方差权衡。

Conclusion: TT-SAC是一种模型无关且无需训练的策略，可有效增强生成式视频模型，将测试时条件调整确立为稳定音频驱动肖像动画的有效机制。

Abstract: Audio-driven talking-head generation has achieved remarkable progress with recent models such as AniTalker, FLOAT, and Sonic. Despite their success, most existing approaches rely on a single static reference image to condition the entire video generation process at inference stage. This static conditioning paradigm often creates a mismatch between fixed identity features and dynamically evolving facial motion, leading to identity drift, temporal inconsistency, and degraded perceptual quality. We introduce Test-Time Self-Adaptive Conditioning (TT-SAC), a parameter-free inference framework that enables pretrained talking-head generators to adapt their conditioning representations during inference without retraining, gradient updates, or additional supervision. Instead of treating the reference portrait as immutable, TT-SAC composes the generator with its encoder in a feedback loop: the generator's own outputs are re-encoded to construct a refined conditioning representation that better aligns with the temporal dynamics of the synthesized sequence. A single adaptation step approximates a self-consistent equilibrium of the generative process, stabilizing identity and motion across time. We further provide theoretical analysis showing that test-time conditioning adaptation reduces feature variance and improves generative stability under mild Lipschitz assumptions, while exhibiting a principled bias-variance tradeoff that governs the optimal strength of adaptation. Extensive experiments on state-of-the-art talking-head generators and benchmark datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in lip-sync accuracy, temporal coherence, identity preservation, and perceptual fidelity. TT-SAC offers a model-agnostic and training-free strategy for enhancing generative video models, establishing test-time conditioning adaptation as an effective mechanism for stabilizing audio-driven portrait animation.

</details>


### [172] [Full-4D: Generating Full-Scope 4D Scenes from a Single-View Video](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25500)
*Tingxi Chen,Ke Hao,Yabo Chen,Zhengxue Cheng,Rong Xie,Li Song,Haibin Huang,Chi Zhang,Xuelong Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种从单视角视频生成完整4D场景（多视角动态场景）的框架，核心思想是将4D生成转化为多视角视频合成+优化重建。贡献包括：构建大规模多视角视频数据集Real-MV-4D；提出融合时间-视图（T-V）注意力的多视角视频扩散模型；使用Flow Matching Distillation损失从合成视频重建显式4D表示（4DGS）。实验表明在视觉保真度和几何一致性上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从单视角视频生成4D场景是病态问题——单一视角缺乏恢复完整动态场景所需的信息。现有方法局限于单目视频、简单3D效果或仅支持原始视角附近的微小扰动，无法实现真正的全范围4D生成。同时，缺乏大规模同步多视角视频数据集进一步阻碍了该方向的发展。

Method: 1) 构建Real-MV-4D数据集：大规模真实环境同步多视角视频，提供4D监督；2) 多视角视频扩散模型：采用融合时间-视图（T-V）注意力机制，直接将几何重投影先验和显式相机条件嵌入视图-时间交互，生成密集同步的T×V视频网格；3) 4D重建：将合成的多视角视频提升为显式4D表示（4DGS），并通过Flow Matching Distillation损失利用多视角先验优化新视角渲染。

Result: 实验表明，该方法在视觉保真度和几何一致性上均优于现有方法，能够从单视角视频生成全范围4D场景。

Conclusion: 本文提出了一种新颖的单视角视频到4D的框架，通过多视角视频合成+优化重建的方式，突破了现有方法的局限，实现了真正的全范围4D场景生成。数据集Real-MV-4D和T-V注意力机制是核心创新点。

Abstract: Generating 4D scenes from a single-view video is inherently ill-posed: a single viewpoint lacks the information needed to recover a complete, dynamic scene with full coverage. Existing methods are typically limited to monocular videos, simple 3D effects, or only small viewpoint perturbations around the original viewpoint, falling short of true 4D generation. Meanwhile, the lack of large-scale datasets capturing full-scope 4D scenes with synchronized multi-view videos further hinders progress in this direction. We propose a novel single-view video-to-4D framework that casts full-scope 4D generation as a multi-view video synthesis followed by optimization-based 4D reconstruction from the generated views. To instantiate this formulation end-to-end, we make three key contributions. First, we introduce Real-MV-4D, a large-scale dataset of synchronized multi-view videos captured in diverse real-world environments to provide the 4D supervision. Second, we train a multi-view video diffusion model driven by a novel fused time(T)-view(V) attention mechanism that directly embeds geometric reprojection priors and explicit camera conditioning into its view-time interactions. Unlike basic feature fusion, this direct binding strictly aligns the generation process with physical 3D priors to produce a dense, synchronized T$\times $V video grid. Third, rather than relying on non-interactive and inconsistent 2D video interpolations, we lift the synthesized multi-view videos into an explicit 4D representation (i.e. 4DGS), regularized by a Flow Matching Distillation loss that exploits the multi-view prior to improve novel-view rendering. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms existing approaches in both visual fidelity and geometric consistency, enabling full-scope 4D scene generation from single-view videos.

</details>


### [173] [Metric--Phase Fields: Decoupling Distance and Sign for Thin-Structure Reconstruction from Unoriented Point Clouds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25503)
*Jiayi Kong,Xuhui Chen,Chen Zong,Fei Hou,Junhui Hou,Wenping Wang,Ying He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Metric-Phase Fields (MPFs)，一种解耦隐式表示，通过分离度量距离（r）和拓扑相位（θ），结合可学习的相位系数β，在保持近表面稳定梯度的同时，既能处理薄结构/open boundaries（优于SDF），又能实现稳定训练和可靠表面提取（优于UDF）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SDF能重建watertight流形但对薄结构和开放边界失败；UDF能处理一般几何但在零等值面存在梯度奇异性，阻碍优化和提取。现有方法无法同时兼顾二者的优势。

Method: ①将隐式表示解耦为无符号度量场r和光滑相位场θ；②通过P=tanh(βθ)得到有界相位指示器（软内外线索）；③使用门控度量公式+残差相位注入获得带稳定近表面梯度的有符号隐函数；④相位系数β可学习，自适应控制相位过渡锐度。

Result: 在合成和扫描的薄壳/薄板形状上，MPFs比最近SDF方法更忠实保留薄层结构，比UDF方法训练更稳定、表面提取更可靠。

Conclusion: MPF通过解耦度量与相位，实现了对SDF（处理thin/open结构）和UDF（训练/提取稳定性）优势的统一，且具有可学习的相位控制机制。

Abstract: Neural Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) excel at reconstructing watertight manifolds but fail on thin structures and open boundaries due to strict inside--outside constraints. Conversely, Unsigned Distance Fields (UDFs) accommodate general geometries but suffer from gradient singularities at the zero-level set, hindering optimization and extraction. We introduce Metric--Phase Fields (MPFs), a decoupled implicit representation that separates metric proximity from topological phase. Given an unoriented point cloud, MPFs learn (i) an unsigned metric field $r$ and (ii) a smooth phase field $θ$, for which we derive a bounded phase indicator $P=\tanh(βθ)$ that provides soft inside--outside cues where they are meaningful. We couple the two fields via a gated-metric formulation with a residual phase injection to obtain a signed implicit function with stable near-surface gradients. The phase coefficient $β$ is learnable, allowing MPFs to adaptively control the sharpness of the phase transition and the degree of saturation of the soft sign indicator. Experiments on both synthetic and scanned thin-shell and thin-plate shapes demonstrate that MPFs preserve thin and layered structures more faithfully than recent SDF-based methods, while also enabling more robust training and more reliable surface extraction than UDF-based approaches. Check out \href{https://github.com/JIAYI-Scarlett/ICML2026-MPF}{MPFs-GitHub} for source code and test models.

</details>


### [174] [Cross-Stage Attention Multi-Expert Network for Radiologist-Inspired Breast Ultrasound Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25518)
*Xinyang Zhai,Chong Yang,Ruizhi Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出CSA-MoE-Net，一种用于乳腺癌超声图像良恶性分类的跨阶段注意力混合专家网络。该方法通过跨阶段注意力模块增强ResNet-18骨干网络的多级特征表示，并利用三支路MoE块分别从全肿瘤图像、肿瘤核心和边界提取互补特征，经自适应门控网络融合。在2129张平衡数据集上，准确率达96.33%，AUC达99.50%，比基线ResNet-18提升显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 乳腺癌超声图像自动分类面临肿瘤异质性、边界模糊和数据不平衡等挑战，现有方法难以充分捕捉形态、纹理和上下文等多维特征信息，导致分类准确率受限。

Method: 提出CSA-MoE-Net：1) 以跨阶段注意力增强的ResNet-18为主干网络，自适应重新校准多级特征，增强关键肿瘤特征并抑制冗余；2) 三支路MoE块分别从全肿瘤图像、肿瘤核心和边界学习互补特征；3) 自适应门控网络融合三者得到融合专家特征(FEF)，捕获形态、纹理和上下文信息。

Result: 在2129张平衡数据集上，20次独立运行平均结果：准确率96.33%，精确率94.09%，召回率98.53%，F1-score 96.25%，AUC 99.50%。相比基线ResNet-18分别提升3.01、0.70、5.37、2.98、5.42个百分点。该机制可无缝嵌入VGG-16、DenseNet-121等网络并带来稳定性能提升。

Conclusion: CSA-MoE-Net通过跨阶段注意力与混合专家机制的协同设计，有效提升了乳腺癌超声图像分类性能，且具有较好的通用性和可迁移性，可为计算机辅助诊断提供可靠支持。

Abstract: Breast ultrasound imaging is an important noninvasive method for early breast cancer diagnosis, but automatic benign/malignant classification remains challenging due to tumor heterogeneity, blurred boundaries, and data imbalance. To improve feature representation and classification accuracy, this paper proposes the Cross-Stage Attention Mixture-of-Experts Network (CSA-MoE-Net). It adopts a Cross-Stage Attention-enhanced ResNet-18 as the backbone, in which the Cross-Stage Attention module adaptively recalibrates multi-level features, thereby enhancing key tumor features and suppressing redundancy. A three-branch Mixture of Experts (MoE) Block learns complementary features from the Whole Tumor Image, Tumor Core, and Boundary, and an Adaptive Gating Network fuses them to capture morphological, textural, and contextual information. The fused features are denoted as Fused Expert Feature (FEF) in the architecture. Experiments on a balanced dataset of 2,129 breast ultrasound images show that, averaged over 20 independent runs, the model achieves an accuracy of 96.33\%, precision of 94.09\%, recall of 98.53\%, F1-score of 96.25\%, and AUC of 99.50\%. Compared to the baseline ResNet-18, these metrics improve by 3.01, 0.70, 5.37, 2.98, and 5.42 percentage points, respectively. The proposed mechanism requires no invasive modification and can be seamlessly embedded into VGG-16, DenseNet-121, etc., yielding stable performance gains, thus providing reliable support for computer-aided diagnosis.

</details>


### [175] [ProSR: Process-Shaped Spatial Reasoning for Reliable Chain-of-Thought in VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25524)
*Jiangyang Li,Cong Wan,Changjie Wu,Songlin Dong,Lingjun Zhang,Linzhe Shi,Xu Wang,Zhiheng Ma,Hang Zhang,Mu Xu,Yihong Gong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 针对VLM空间推理中的过程退化问题（虚假视觉锚定和尾部不稳定），提出ProSR框架，通过反事实不变性惩罚和尾部漂移惩罚优化推理过程，提升视觉依赖性和轨迹稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM空间推理训练范式依赖结果对齐或过程模仿，缺乏对推理过程的显式约束，导致模型在强化学习优化中出现过程退化（虚假视觉锚定和尾部不稳定），无法保证真正的视觉依赖和稳定推理轨迹。

Method: 构建高质量CoT空间推理数据集；提出ProSR过程塑造优化框架，包含反事实不变性惩罚（增强视觉依赖）和尾部漂移惩罚（提升轨迹稳定性），将优化目标从单一答案正确性扩展到过程级维度。

Result: 在多个复杂和分布外空间推理基准上，ProSR不仅提升了答案准确率，还生成了更稳定、更依赖视觉证据的推理轨迹。

Conclusion: 通过对推理过程施加显式约束（视觉依赖和轨迹稳定性），可以有效改善VLM在空间推理任务中的过程退化问题，同时提升准确率和推理质量。

Abstract: Reliable spatial reasoning remains a core bottleneck for vision-language models (VLMs). Existing mainstream training paradigms for spatial reasoning largely rely on outcome alignment or process imitation, lacking explicit constraints on the reasoning process, and therefore struggle to ensure genuine visual dependence and stable reasoning trajectories. In this paper, we construct a high-quality CoT dataset covering diverse spatial phenomena and diagnose the model's reasoning process, revealing two typical types of process degradation during reinforcement learning optimization: Spurious Grounding, which bypasses visual evidence, and Tail Instability, where uncertainty abnormally rises in the later stage of reasoning. To address these issues, we propose ProSR, a process-shaping optimization framework for spatial reasoning. Through a Counterfactual Invariance Penalty and a Tail Drift Penalty, ProSR extends the optimization objective from single answer correctness to two process-level dimensions: visual dependence and trajectory stability. Experiments on multiple complex and out-of-distribution spatial reasoning benchmarks show that ProSR improves answer accuracy while generating reasoning trajectories that are more stable and more dependent on visual evidence.

</details>


### [176] [Location Prior Generation via Multi-Source Urban Data Fusion for Low-Altitude Air Mobility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25530)
*Xiang Xie,Xiaonan Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出LPGF框架，融合多源数据（Sentinel-2、无人机遥测、GPS轨迹、OSM）生成建筑高度先验，解决全球95%以上建筑缺失高度信息的问题，通过三级优先级层级和可选阴影估计模块（SHEM）实现结构化场景构建，适用于低空经济中的无人机导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球地理数据库中超过95%的建筑缺乏高度信息（第三维数据），导致低空经济中的无人机无法利用预计算的三维场景信息，只能依赖实时机载感知，效率与安全性受限。

Method: 提出Location Prior Generation Framework (LPGF)，集成多源数据：三级优先级架构（OSM标签→楼层数×3.2m→建筑类型默认高度）；可选阴影估计模块（SHEM），满足四标准质量门控时激活，否则使用结构化回退方案。

Result: 在MiTra A50米兰数据集上，质量门控正确识别两种成像失效模式（10m GSD亚像素阴影和0.93m GSD地面阴影融合），生成一致的27栋建筑先验；第三级默认高度验证MAE=3.07m，在5.0m不确定度范围内；最坏误差约5.5m。

Conclusion: 结构化的、经质量门控的多源数据融合方法能够有效引导低空城市作业的三维场景覆盖，在无需高精度实时感知的情况下提升无人机导航的预规划能力。

Abstract: Building height, the third dimension (3D) of urban spatial data, is absent in over 95% of structures in global geospatial databases. For the emerging low-altitude economy, this data gap forces each aerial platform to rely on real-time onboard sensing rather than pre-computed 3D scene geometry. We present the Location Prior Generation Framework (LPGF), a multi-source data fusion pipeline that integrates Sentinel-2 imagery, UAV telemetry, vehicle GPS trajectories, and OpenStreetMap footprints into structured, reusable urban location priors. LPGF assigns building heights through a three-tier priority hierarchy: (1) explicit OSM height tags where available, (2) floor count multiplied by 3.2 m per story where recorded, and (3) building-type default heights otherwise, yielding a worst-case error of approximately 5.5 m. An optional shadow-based height estimation module (SHEM) is activated only when a four-criterion quality gate is satisfied; when any criterion fails, the pipeline routes to structured fallback. On the MiTra A50 Milan dataset, the quality gate correctly identified two imaging failure modes: sub-pixel shadows at 10 m GSD and ground shadow merging at 0.93 m GSD, producing a consistent 27-building prior in both cases. Tier 3 type-default heights were validated against manual floor counts (n=15), achieving MAE=3.07 m within the 5.0 m uncertainty bound. The framework demonstrates that structured, quality-gated fusion of universally available data streams can bootstrap 3D scene coverage for low-altitude urban operations.

</details>


### [177] [Tetris: Tile-level Sampling for Efficient and High-Fidelity Video Object Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25538)
*Chanwut Kittivorawong,Alena Chao,Charlie Si,Alvin Cheung*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Tetris 提出了基于瓦片的 polyomino 数据模型，通过细粒度时空剪枝在静态视频中高效提取物体轨迹，在保证 5% 精度损失的前提下实现最高 68.8 倍的吞吐量提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹物化系统为降低成本采用时间帧采样，但会丢失细粒度跟踪所需的帧间运动信息。静态视频中大部分区域不含感兴趣物体，且不同区域可容忍不同采样率，现有方法未能充分利用这一特性进行高效剪枝。

Method: 将视频分解为基于瓦片的 polyomino 数据模型，运行三个上游算子：分类器识别相关瓦片并分组为 polyomino；整数线性规划（ILP）在用户指定精度约束下剪枝冗余 polyomino；打包器将保留下来的 polyomino 组装成画布以最小化检测器调用次数。

Result: 在 7 个静态视频数据集上，Tetris 在 5% 跟踪精度损失范围内保持稳定，而基线系统在 3/7 数据集上超出该界限。在此边界下，Tetris 吞吐量比基线系统最高提升 17.4 倍，比参考流水线最高提升 68.8 倍。

Conclusion: 基于 tile 的 polyomino 模型能有效实现细粒度时空剪枝，在不显著损失精度的情况下大幅降低检测器调用，为静态视频的轨迹物化提供了高效且高保真的解决方案。

Abstract: Track materialization converts raw video into reusable object tracks that downstream queries can run against without rerunning tracking, but extracting those tracks efficiently and with high fidelity remains expensive. Prior systems reduce cost through temporal frame sampling, erasing the inter-frame motion that fine-grained tracking requires. In stationary video, however, large portions of each frame contain no objects of interest, and the remaining regions tolerate different sampling rates. We present Tetris, a track-extraction system that decomposes videos into a tile-based polyomino data model, enabling fine-grained spatiotemporal pruning that reduces detector calls with minimal fidelity loss. Tetris runs three operators upstream of the user-provided detector: a classifier identifies relevant tiles and groups them into polyominoes, an integer linear program (ILP) prunes redundant polyominoes under a user-specified accuracy constraint, and a packer assembles the survivors into canvases that minimize detector calls. Across 7 stationary-video datasets, Tetris stays within a 5% tracking accuracy loss of a full-frame, every-frame reference pipeline, whereas prior systems exceed this bound on 3 of the 7 datasets. At this 5% bound, Tetris achieves up to 17.4x higher throughput than prior systems and up to 68.8x higher than the reference pipeline. The project page is at https://tetris-db.github.io .

</details>


### [178] [ComPose: A Unified Completion-Pose Framework for Robust Category-Level Object Pose Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25553)
*Huan Ren,Yihan Chen,Chuxin Wang,Nailong Liu,Wenfei Yang,Tianzhu Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ComPose提出了一种将形状补全与类别级物体姿态估计紧密融合的统一框架，通过渐进式关键点补全模块和几何关系一致性损失，在不依赖类别先验的情况下实现了优于现有方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有类别级物体姿态估计方法受限于观测点云的不完整性，无法捕捉完整物体形状进行鲁棒姿态推理。将点云补全作为独立预处理步骤会引入累积误差和额外计算开销，影响精度和效率。

Method: 提出ComPose统一框架，核心包括：(1) 基于关键点的渐进式补全模块，通过逐步预测稀疏关键点及其周围密集点集来恢复完整形状；(2) 几何关系编码模块，增强关键点特征的局部和全局几何上下文；(3) 几何关系一致性损失，强制观测关键点与其预测NOCS坐标之间的结构对齐。

Result: 在标准基准测试上的大量实验表明，该方法在不依赖类别级形状先验的情况下，优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 将形状补全与姿态估计紧密集成而非作为独立预处理步骤，能够有效提升类别级物体姿态估计的精度和效率，关键点渐进式补全和几何一致性约束是关键设计要素。

Abstract: Category-level object pose estimation aims to predict the pose and size of arbitrary objects in specific categories. Existing methods struggle with the inherent incompleteness of observed point clouds, which limits their ability to capture complete object shapes for robust pose reasoning. While point cloud completion offers a promising solution, naively treating it as a separate preprocessing step for partial observations introduces compounding errors and additional computational overhead, ultimately hindering both accuracy and efficiency. To address these challenges, we propose ComPose, a novel unified framework that tightly integrates shape completion to provide complete geometric cues for enhanced pose estimation. At the core of ComPose is a keypoint-based progressive completion module, which recovers full shape representations by progressively predicting a sparse set of keypoints and their surrounding dense point sets, empowering the keypoints to capture holistic object geometries. A geometric relation encoding module further enriches keypoint features with both local and global geometric context. In addition, we introduce a novel geometric relation consistency loss to enforce structural alignment between observed keypoints and their predicted NOCS coordinates, ensuring globally coherent coordinate transformations. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches without relying on category-level shape priors.

</details>


### [179] [Are We Overconfident in Models and Results for Semi-Supervised 3D Medical Image Segmentation?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25561)
*Jun Li,Ziwei Qin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文揭示了半监督学习中存在的双重过度自信问题（算法上的确认偏差和策略上的测试集过拟合），并提出了一种三空间校准分割框架（TCSeg），通过解耦置信度与不确定性来修正偏差，同时倡导更严格的评估协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前半监督学习存在双重过度自信问题：(1) 算法层面，伪标签框架混淆预测置信度与不确定性，导致确认偏差；(2) 策略层面，部分研究使用测试集进行验证，导致性能被高估，引发过拟合军备竞赛。需要缓解这些虚假进步。

Method: 提出TCSeg框架，核心是一个双轴可靠性评估引擎，显式解耦置信度与不确定性。利用该信号在特征空间、概率空间和图像空间三个空间协同检测和纠正确认偏差，实现三空间校准分割。

Result: 在三个基准数据集上，TCSeg在现有评估协议下持续表现强劲。

Conclusion: 当前半监督学习进步可能被高估，呼吁社区采用多轮协议的最终检查点结果建立更严格的基准。TCSeg代码将开源。

Abstract: Semi-supervised learning has become a dominant paradigm for reducing annotation costs. However, we argue that the current progress is clouded by a twofold overconfidence problem. Algorithmically, mainstream pseudo-labeling frameworks often conflate prediction confidence with uncertainty, leading to severe confirmation bias. Strategically, since multiple benchmark datasets lack dedicated validation sets, some studies use the test set for validation as well, leading to inflated performance estimates. Subsequent methods, compelled to employ the same strategy to surpass reported SOTA, trigger an arms race of overfitting. This raises concerns that the impressive numerical gains in the community may reflect overfitting rather than genuine progress. Thus, we propose a tri-space calibrated segmentation framework founded on a principled dual-axis reliability assessment engine. It explicitly decouples confidence from uncertainty and uses this signal to detect and correct confirmation bias across feature, probability, and image spaces in a collaborative manner. Across three benchmark datasets, TCSeg consistently delivers strong performance under existing evaluation protocols. More importantly, we advocate that the community report final-checkpoint results under multiple-run protocols, thereby establishing more rigorous benchmarks with a more realistic perspective. Code will be available: github.com/DirkLiii/TCSeg.

</details>


### [180] [CodecSplat: Ultra-Compact Latent Coding for Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25563)
*Pengpeng Yu,Runqing Jiang,Qi Zhang,Dingquan Li,Jing Wang,Yulan Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CodecSplat 提出了一种面向前馈式 3D 高斯喷溅的极紧凑潜在编码框架，通过将压缩集成到特征到高斯的生成流程中，利用结构化中间特征表示，在 DL3DV 和 RealEstate10K 数据集上实现了比直接压缩生成的高斯原语小约一个数量级的码率，同时保持可控的率失真性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的前馈式 3D 高斯喷溅方法虽然能够从稀疏视图重建可渲染的高斯原语，但无法提供紧凑的场景表示用于存储或传输。直接应用现有的 3DGS 压缩方法到生成的高斯原语上，由于与内部特征生成过程解耦且在最终的不规则 3D 表示上操作，压缩效率受限。

Method: CodecSplat 首先将中间 2D 高斯生成特征编码为熵编码的场景比特流；解码时重构潜在特征，用于预测深度和高斯参数，再映射到 3D 高斯原语。该方法基于前馈式高斯喷溅主干，采用深度引导的多视图特征精炼和分层学习的特征编解码器。

Result: 在 DL3DV 数据集上达到 23.56-26.36 dB PSNR，每场景仅需 20.00-107.77 KiB；在 RealEstate10K 数据集上达到 24.76-27.05 dB PSNR，每场景仅需 3.37-12.51 KiB。码率约为直接压缩前馈生成高斯原语的方法的十分之一。

Conclusion: CodecSplat 通过将压缩融入前馈式高斯生成流程，避免了在非规则 3D 高斯原语上进行低效压缩，实现了极紧凑的场景表示，并具备可控的率失真特性，显著优于传统解耦压缩方案。

Abstract: While feed-forward 3D Gaussian splatting reconstructs renderable Gaussian primitives from sparse context views without per-scene optimization, existing pipelines do not provide a compact scene representation for storage or transmission. A natural solution is to apply existing 3DGS compression methods to the generated Gaussian primitives. However, this approach operates on the final irregular 3D representation and is decoupled from the internal feature-to-Gaussian generation process, which limits compression efficiency. To address this, we introduce CodecSplat, an ultra-compact latent coding framework for feed-forward 3D Gaussian splatting. CodecSplat first encodes an intermediate 2D Gaussian-generation feature into an entropy-coded scene bitstream. At the decoder, the latent feature is reconstructed and used to predict depth and Gaussian parameters, which are then mapped to 3D Gaussian primitives. Note that, by integrating compression into the feed-forward Gaussian generation pipeline, CodecSplat avoids inefficient compression over irregular 3D Gaussian primitives and allows the codec to exploit the structured intermediate feature representation. We instantiate CodecSplat on a feed-forward Gaussian splatting backbone with depth-guided multi-view feature refinement and a hierarchical learned feature codec.
