Abstract: The growing availability of clinical data has increased the use of machine learning, yet centralized data aggregation is often infeasible for sensitive health information. Federated Learning (FL) offers a distributed alternative, but its adoption is limited by substantial heterogeneity across institutional datasets, making harmonization a critical but frequently overlooked prerequisite for multi-site analytics. We introduce PrivFusion, a privacy-preserving multi-agent framework that automates the harmonization of structured datasets prior to federated training. PrivFusion uses agents to analyze local data, cluster semantically similar features across sites, and provide iterative transformation recommendations until alignment is achieved. Evaluation across four heterogeneous COVID-19 datasets demonstrates that PrivFusion effectively and efficiently harmonizes multi-site data while substantially reducing manual effort.

</details>


### [441] [Rethinking Continual Anomaly Detection on the Edge: Benchmarking Under Realistic Industrial Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24251)
*Chad Weatherly,Sen Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出现有持续异常检测（CAD）方法存在评估不现实、缺乏系统比较和忽略边缘部署限制三大问题，提出了统一基准测试和新的连续漂移协议，并发现现有CAD方法并不比简单经验回放的传统方法更优。为此，作者提出DINOSaur——一种无训练方法，结合冻结的DINOv3骨干网络、空间索引核集记忆和邻域限制异常评分，在五个协议上均优于所有方法，并在NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上实现亚100ms推理和30秒内设备端适应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有持续异常检测方法存在三个关键缺陷：评估不切实际、缺乏系统性比较、未考虑边缘部署的硬件约束，亟需统一的基准和更实用的方法。

Method: 提出DINOSaur方法，采用冻结的DINOv3骨干网络提取特征，结合空间索引的核集记忆库和邻域限制异常评分机制，无需训练即可实现持续学习。

Result: 在五种协议上均超越所有现有CAD方法；在NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上推理时间低于100ms，设备端适应新任务在30秒内完成，且实现了零遗忘。

Conclusion: 现有CAD方法并不比简单的经验回放策略更优，而DINOSaur通过无训练设计和冻结特征提取器，在性能、效率和零遗忘之间取得了更优平衡，更适合实际工业边缘部署场景。

Abstract: Continual anomaly detection (CAD) addresses the need for industrial inspection systems to adapt to evolving production conditions, yet existing methods share three critical gaps: unrealistic evaluation, no systematic comparison, and no consideration of edge deployment constraints. We introduce a unified benchmark combining discrete-task evaluation on structural and logical anomalies, a novel continuous drift protocol, the first head-to-head comparison of all published CAD methods, and computational efficiency profiling on edge hardware. Our results reveal that existing CAD methods do not consistently outperform traditional approaches with simple experience replay. Thus motivated, we propose DINOSaur, a training-free method combining a frozen DINOv3 backbone with spatially-indexed coreset memory and neighborhood-restricted anomaly scoring. DINOSaur achieves zero forgetting by construction, outperforms all evaluated methods across all five protocols, and runs at sub-100\,ms inference on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, with on-device adaptation to new tasks in under 30 seconds.

</details>


### [442] [Optimizing Digital Therapeutic Interventions: Online Learning under Endogenous Adherence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24261)
*Eric Pulick,Stephanie Carpenter,Matthew Buman,Yonatan Mintz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对数字疗法（DTs）中患者依从性动态变化的问题，提出了一种结合推荐效果与依从性效应的决策支持框架。该框架使用线性动态系统（LDS）建模患者随时间变化的参与能力，并通过logit链接内生化依从行为。作者证明了有限时间识别保证，并提出了基于乐观主义的UCB-BOLD算法，实现次线性遗憾。实验表明，UCB-BOLD在条件风险价值遗憾上比次优基准低2-3倍，尤其对某些患者类型效果显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有决策支持框架要么仅建模推荐效果，要么将依从性视为外生变量，忽略了推荐与依从性之间的动态交互影响。临床医生在资源有限的情况下，需要更有效的工具来规划长期治疗推荐，以提升患者健康效果。

Method: 1) 使用线性动态系统（LDS）建模患者随时间变化的参与能力，同时捕捉推荐效果和依从性效应；2) 通过logit链接将依从行为内生化；3) 建立该模型的有限时间识别保证；4) 提出基于乐观主义的在线治疗选择算法UCB-BOLD，并证明其达到次线性遗憾；5) 利用微随机试验数据生成合成患者队列进行消融实验评估。

Result: UCB-BOLD在条件风险价值遗憾上比次优基准低2-3倍；对于某些患者类型，围绕推荐与依从性效应进行显式规划的收益显著，而短视或启发式方法仅对部分患者类型有效。

Conclusion: 数字疗法的决策支持工具应包含动态模型，以高效利用数据优化资源配置、改善患者健康。在依从性与推荐效果相互影响的情景下，显式规划优于简单启发式方法。

Abstract: A critical challenge facing clinicians managing chronic disease interventions is sustaining long-run patient health given limited information and resources. Digital therapeutics (DTs) provide a cost-effective way to manage interventions at scale through repeated interactions (e.g. daily treatment recommendations), but patient success is highly dependent on their adherence. Behavioral psychology suggests that both treatment recommendations and past adherence affect future adherence, yet existing decision support frameworks for DTs model only recommendation effects or treat adherence as exogenous context, leaving a key gap in model and algorithm development. To address this gap, we present a DT decision support framework that captures both recommendation and adherence effects, allowing clinicians to better plan treatment recommendations. We model a patient's time-varying capacity for engagement with treatment using a linear dynamical system (LDS) that captures both recommendation and adherence effects, endogenously connected to adherence behavior with a logit link. We establish finite-time identification guarantees for this model, extending LDS results to our setting. Next, we propose an optimism-based algorithm, UCB-BOLD, for online treatment selection and prove that it achieves sublinear regret. We evaluate UCB-BOLD against benchmarks via ablation studies on a synthetic patient cohort generated using micro-randomized trial data. DT decision support tools can include dynamical models to enable decision makers to efficiently use the data in DT settings to improve patient health through effective resource allocation. While myopic or heuristic approaches suffice for some patient types, the benefits of explicitly planning around recommendation and adherence effects are significant for others; UCB-BOLD achieves 2-3x lower conditional value-at-risk regret than the next-best benchmark.

</details>


### [443] [A lift for input-convex neural network training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24274)
*Ali Siahkoohi,Anirudh Thatipelli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种"提升法"(lift)：通过训练一个无约束的超网络来生成ICNN的层间权重，替代传统的非负投影梯度下降或softplus重参数化方法。该方法通过超网络引入的随机性软化损失景观，使训练逃离梯度衰减区域，在多个任务上取得更低测试损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ICNN的层间权重必须非负，但现有方法存在严重缺陷：PGD硬投影的非光滑性与ICNN训练不兼容；softplus重参数化导致梯度指数衰减，造成死权重和损失平台。需要一种既能保持非负约束、又能避免梯度消失的替代方案。

Method: 提出"提升法"：不直接约束层间权重，而是训练一个无约束的超网络，该超网络从输入批次的排列不变摘要中发射出层间权重。核心结构包括三个必要成分：可学习的偏置（作为松弛变量）、超网络主体（以目标批次为条件）、以及通过批次随机性耦合两者的交叉协方差。三者缺一不可。

Result: 在log-concave能量基建模（从一维玩具到图像风格潜变量）和21维表格数据的凸势能归一化流任务上，提升法均达到比PGD和softplus更低的测试损失，并将受平台限制的训练轨迹转变为向谷底下降的轨迹。

Conclusion: 超网络提升法通过引入受控随机性有效软化了ICNN训练中的非凸损失景观，为处理硬约束下的梯度衰减问题提供了新的范式。三个结构成分的协同作用是软化效果的关键。

Abstract: Input-convex neural networks (ICNNs) are widely used for log-concave density estimation, convex-potential normalizing flows, optimal transport, and transport-map inversion for high-dimensional Bayesian posteriors. These tasks share a structural constraint: the inter-layer weights of the ICNN must remain non-negative. The standard recipe, projected gradient descent (PGD) onto the non-negative cone, applies a hard, non-smooth projection -- the stiff-penalty limit of an ADMM-style constraint splitting -- and its classical convergence guarantees do not transfer to the non-smooth ICNN training landscape; the differentiable alternative, softplus reparametrization, attenuates the gradient exponentially in the weight magnitude, stalling training with dead inter-layer weights and plateaued loss. Inspired by parameter-extension lifts of PDE-constrained inverse problems, we propose the lift: instead of constraining the inter-layer weights directly, we train an unconstrained hypernetwork that emits them from a permutation-invariant summary of the input batch. This adds stochasticity to the training dynamics that softens the loss landscape, letting the iterates escape the gradient-attenuated region where direct softplus stalls. We trace this softening to three structural ingredients -- a learnable bias acting as slack, a hypernetwork body that conditions on the target batch, and a cross-covariance coupling the two through batch stochasticity -- and prove each one necessary: deleting any single ingredient collapses the cross-covariance that carries the softening. On log-concave energy-based modeling from one-dimensional toy targets to image-flavored latents, and convex-potential normalizing flows on a 21-dimensional tabular benchmark, we show that the lift reaches a lower test loss than both PGD and direct softplus, and turns a plateau-bounded training trajectory into a valley-descending one.

</details>


### [444] [Fourier Feature Pyramids for Physics-Informed Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24278)
*Brandon Zhao,Yixuan Wang,Jonathan T. Barron,Katherine L. Bouman,Dor Verbin,Pratul P. Srinivasan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为beignet的新型神经场架构，通过可训练的多分辨率傅里叶特征金字塔替代随机傅里叶特征嵌入，在求解偏微分方程时比现有PINN方法更精确、更高效，且能用Adam优化器达到接近机器精度的残差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PINN方法在求解PDE时难以获得高精度解，且计算量随参数数量增长而扩展性差。

Method: 提出beignet模型，核心是用可训练的多分辨率傅里叶特征金字塔替代随机傅里叶特征嵌入；通过每层的傅里叶插值在连续坐标处提取特征，再用全连接神经网络解码；利用链式法则将自动微分的神经网络导数与FFT谱计算的网格导数结合，高效计算空间导数。

Result: 在PDE基准测试中，beignet用更少参数获得比最先进PINN方法更精确的解；在自相似无粘Burgers爆破解问题上，使用Adam优化器即可将残差降至接近机器精度，此前只有计算昂贵的高阶优化器才能达到。

Conclusion: beignet通过可训练的多分辨率傅里叶特征金字塔，在精度、计算效率和稳定性方面均优于现有PINN方法，为求解困难PDE提供了一种更实用的方案。

Abstract: We present an improved neural field architecture for solving partial differential equations (PDEs). Current physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) provide a flexible framework for solving PDEs, but they struggle to achieve highly accurate solutions and require computation that scales poorly with parameter count. Our model, which we call beignet (Bandlimited Embedding with Interpolated Grid Network), replaces the random Fourier feature embedding used by existing PINN models with a trainable multi-resolution Fourier feature pyramid. To query beignet at a continuous coordinate, we use Fourier interpolation at each level of the pyramid to return features at the input coordinate, and then decode this vector with a fully-connected neural network trunk. Our model provides multiple benefits: 1) Spatial derivatives can be computed efficiently by using the chain rule to compose derivatives of the neural network computed with automatic differentiation with derivatives of the feature grid computed spectrally by the Fast Fourier transform (FFT). 2) beignet can achieve higher accuracy in a compute-efficient manner by scaling the parameter count of this Fourier feature pyramid, instead of the less-efficient strategy of scaling the neural network architecture. 3) beignet can directly control the representation bandlimit, resulting in more stable optimization for difficult PDEs. We demonstrate that beignet finds significantly more accurate solutions on PDE benchmarks using fewer parameters than state-of-the-art PINN methods. We further evaluate beignet on the self-similar inviscid Burgers blowup problem and show that it can minimize residuals to near machine precision using Adam, an accuracy regime previously attained only by using computationally expensive higher-order optimizers.

</details>


### [445] [Faithfulness as Information Flow: Evaluating and Training Faithful Chain-of-Thought Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24286)
*Jinghan Jia,Joe Benton,Eric Easley*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从信息流视角研究链式思维推理的忠实性，提出充分性、完整性和必要性三个互补属性，并基于熵、KL散度和梯度开发诊断指标。进一步提出四种训练时干预方法（注意力掩码、反向梯度掩码、CoT梯度、对抗扰动），实验表明这些方法能增强CoT中介作用、提高忠实性并降低对错误提示的敏感性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CoT推理存在"提示到答案"的捷径，导致推理过程不忠实于实际计算，即使CoT看起来合理也可能具有误导性。需要一种任务无关的框架来检测和改进CoT推理的忠实性。

Method: 提出信息流视角下CoT忠实性的三个属性：充分性、完整性和必要性，并分别用基于熵、掩码KL散度和梯度的诊断指标来度量。在此基础上，提出四种基于验证器的在线策略RL训练时干预方法：注意力掩码、仅反向梯度掩码、CoT梯度以及提示表征的对抗扰动。

Result: 在提示算术、可奖励黑客的代码修复以及DAPO-Math模型（无提示训练但注入错误提示评估）上，干预方法均能向更强的CoT中介方向转变行为和结构指标。具体使捷径和奖励黑客行为在CoT中更透明，改善了任务无关的忠实性指标，某些设置下还降低了对错误提示的敏感性。

Conclusion: 在训练过程中控制信息流是实现更忠实、更可监控的CoT推理的实用途径。

Abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning is useful for monitoring language models only when the reasoning trace faithfully reflects the computation that produces the final answer. However, models can rely on prompt-to-answer shortcuts that bypass the CoT, making the visible reasoning trace misleading even when it appears plausible. We study CoT faithfulness through a structural information-flow perspective: faithful reasoning should route answer-relevant information through the mediated path from prompt to CoT to answer, rather than through a direct prompt-to-answer shortcut. This perspective yields a task-agnostic framework based on three complementary properties, sufficiency, completeness, and necessity, which we instantiate with entropy-based, masked-KL, and gradient-based diagnostics. We show that these metrics recover externally judged faithfulness differences in hinted reasoning, and identify a low-entropy failure mode of KL-based diagnostics where gradient-based measures remain more stable. Building on this analysis, we introduce update-time interventions for verifier-based on-policy RL, including attention masking, backward-only gradient masking, CoT gradients, and adversarial perturbations of prompt representations. Across hinted arithmetic, reward-hackable code repair, and DAPO-Math models trained without hints but evaluated under wrong-hint injection, our interventions shift behavioral and structural indicators toward stronger CoT mediation. In particular, they make shortcut and reward-hacking behavior more transparent in the CoT and improve task-agnostic faithfulness metrics, while in some settings also reducing wrong-hint susceptibility. Our results suggest that controlling information flow during training is a practical route toward more faithful and monitorable CoT reasoning. Code is available at https://github.com/safety-research/faithful-cot.

</details>


### [446] [TUBE: Tangent Upper Bound on Evidence for Discrete Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24292)
*Arseny Ivanov,Sergei Kholkin,Vladislav Gromadskii,Grigoriy Ksenofontov,Ivan Oseledets,Alexander Korotin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了TUBE（证据切线上限），这是一种可计算的对数似然变分上界，可用于评估离散扩散模型等潜变量模型。通过TUBE的实证分析发现，块状掩码扩散模型和块状任意顺序自回归模型在似然度上仍然严格低于精确的自回归模型基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散扩散模型无法精确计算对数似然，现有评估依赖于ELBO，无法得知真实值可能高出多少，因此需要一种可计算的上界来更准确地衡量模型性能。

Method: 提出TUBE（Tangent Upper Bound on Evidence），一种对数似然的变分上界，可通过无偏蒙特卡洛估计器计算，适用于掩码扩散模型、任意顺序自回归模型及其块状变体。

Result: 通过TUBE对块状MDM和块状AO-ARM的评估，发现这些模型的似然度严格低于精确ARM基线。

Conclusion: 自回归模型在似然度指标上仍然占据主导地位，离散扩散模型尽管有其他优势，但在精确似然估计上不及ARM。

Abstract: Log-likelihood is a standard metric for evaluating generative models. Unfortunately, in contrast to autoregressive models (ARMs), discrete diffusion models generally do not admit exact computation of this quantity. Existing evaluations, therefore, rely on the evidence lower bound (ELBO), leaving unclear how much higher the true value may be. We address this by introducing the Tangent Upper Bound on Evidence (TUBE), a variational upper bound on log-likelihood that admits an unbiased Monte Carlo estimator. Our TUBE extends across latent-variable models, including masked diffusion models (MDMs), any-order ARMs (AO-ARMs), and block variants of both. Applied to block MDMs and block AO-ARMs, TUBE reveals our key empirical finding that these models lie strictly below the exact ARM baseline, showing that ARMs still dominate in likelihood.

</details>


### [447] [Private Adaptive Covariance Estimation via Gaussian Graphical Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24295)
*Cecilia Ferrando,Miguel Fuentes,Brett Mullins,Cameron Musco,Daniel Sheldon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出PACE-GGM方法，通过自适应选择经验协方差矩阵中信息量最高的条目并添加差分隐私噪声，结合最大熵重构得到高斯图模型，在高维低至中等隐私预算场景下显著优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统差分隐私协方差估计对所有条目均匀加噪，在变量有独立边界时效率低。希望将隐私预算集中在最有信息量的条目上，提高估计精度。

Method: 每一轮选择当前近似最差的条目，用高斯机制加噪测量，然后通过最大熵重构目标重建完整协方差矩阵，从而诱导出高斯图模型结构。

Result: 在多种真实数据集上，PACE-GGM在估计误差上一致优于高斯机制及其他基线方法，尤其在高维、低至中等隐私预算场景下优势明显。

Conclusion: 数据自适应的隐私预算分配策略能有效提升差分隐私协方差估计的性能，PACE-GGM为此提供了可行且高效的解决方案。

Abstract: We propose PACE-GGM, a data-adaptive differentially private method for covariance estimation that concentrates its privacy budget on the most informative entries of the empirical covariance matrix, rather than perturbing all entries. This applies in the natural setting where the modeler supplies separate bounds for each variable, so that individual entries can be measured with less noise than the full matrix. In each round, our method selects a poorly approximated entry, measures it using the Gaussian mechanism, and then reconstructs a full covariance matrix using a maximum-entropy reconstruction objective, leading to a Gaussian graphical model structure. Experiments on diverse real-world datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in estimation error with respect to the Gaussian mechanism and other baselines, particularly in high-dimensional and low-to-moderate privacy regimes.

</details>


### [448] [LLMs Show No Signs Of Individuated Metacognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24299)
*M. Moran,Mark Whiting*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文对20个前沿大语言模型在6个基准测试中的二元置信度判断进行因子分析，发现跨模型置信度矩阵接近秩一结构，模型间置信度差异主要由决策阈值而非个体化元认知能力决定，在多数领域未发现显著的功能性元认知证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究关注聚合校准（calibration），但对置信度背后结构理解不足。论文旨在探究LLM的置信度判断是否反映真正的功能性元认知——即无需实际执行任务就能评估自身能力的能力。

Method: 对20个前沿LLM在6个基准测试上的二元置信度判断使用四分相关因子分析（tetrachoric factor analysis）结合逐对校准（pairwise calibration）进行分析，探究置信度差异与性能差异之间的关系。

Result: 1）事实回忆和信息检索任务中，跨模型置信度矩阵接近秩一结构，单一主导因子解释大部分潜在方差；2）模型共享项目级难度轴，差异主要体现在决策阈值；3）移除所有模型一致同意的项目后，置信度与性能关系消失；4）逐对校准效应即使显著也很小，控制共享因子上的基率差异后消失；5）数学推理看似例外，实则是推理模型在链式思维中实际解题而非表达元认知的混淆。

Conclusion: 在所有测试领域未发现显著的语言化个体化元认知证据，LLM的置信度更多反映共享的项目难度和决策阈值，而非真正的自我能力评估。

Abstract: Confidence-weighted routing, selective abstention, and ensemble weighting all assume that a model's stated confidence is informative about its capability on the question being asked. They presume functional metacognition, the capacity to assess one's own capabilities, without exercising them. Aggregate calibration is well studied, with mixed results, but the underlying structure of elicited confidence is less well understood. We decompose binary confidence judgements from 20 frontier Large Language Models (LLMs) across six benchmarks using tetrachoric factor analysis paired with pairwise calibration, asking whether two models that differ in confidence also differ in performance. On factual recall and information retrieval benchmarks the cross-model confidence matrix is approximately rank-one and a single dominant factor captures most of the latent variance. Models retrieving facts share an item-level difficulty axis and differ mainly in their decision thresholds along it. Across all benchmarks the relationship between confidence and performance collapses once items that all models agree on are removed. Inter-model pairwise calibration is small even where statistically significant, and what remains shrinks to nothing once base-rate differences along the shared factor are controlled for. Mathematical reasoning is the apparent exception, but this turns out to be a confound where reasoning models answer questions about their confidence by trying to solve them in their chain of thought, bypassing the sub-symbolic self-knowledge we seek to measure. We find no evidence for significant verbalised individuated metacognition in any tested domain.

</details>


### [449] [ChaosBench-Logic v2: Evaluating LLM Logical Reasoning over Dynamical Systems at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24305)
*Noel Thomas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出ChaosBench-Logic v2基准（40,886题，覆盖165个动力系统）和CARE评估协议，发现前沿模型在状态转移推理上接近随机（MCC=0.05），而一阶逻辑演绎可达MCC=0.52；部分模型在分岔问题上出现系统性负相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准二值推理基准无法暴露先验坍塌、释义不一致、参数依赖动态推理失败等关键缺陷，需要更全面的评估方法。

Method: 构建ChaosBench-Logic v2（含27个FOL谓词、78条公理边）及CARE协议，评估14个模型在动力系统推理上的表现。

Result: 前沿模型在状态转换推理上MCC仅0.05（接近随机）；FOL演绎MCC达0.52；闭源模型优势集中在跨指标和一致性任务；开源Qwen 2.5-32B在指标诊断上以0.91远超0.45；两个模型在分岔问题上出现负MCC。

Conclusion: 现有模型在动力系统推理上存在严重缺陷，尤其是状态转换和分岔等需要理解参数依赖动态的任务，CARE协议能有效暴露这些系统性失败模式。

Abstract: Standard accuracy on binary reasoning benchmarks hides critical failure modes: prior collapse, inconsistency under paraphrase, and inability to reason about parameter-dependent dynamics. We present ChaosBench-Logic v2, a 40,886-question benchmark over 165 dynamical systems with 27 FOL predicates and 78 axiom edges, together with CARE (Calibration- and Adversarial-Robust Evaluation), a protocol that surfaces these pathologies. Evaluating 14 models, we find that regime-transition reasoning remains near random (MCC = 0.05) even for frontier models, whereas FOL deduction with given premises reaches MCC = 0.52. Per-family decomposition shows that the proprietary-model advantage concentrates on cross-indicator (+0.40) and consistency tasks, while open-source Qwen 2.5-32B dominates indicator diagnostics (0.91 vs. 0.45). Two models exhibit negative MCC on bifurcation questions, confirmed as systematic anti-correlation via confusion-matrix analysis.

</details>


### [450] [From One-Pass SGD to Data Reuse: Mini-Batch Scaling Laws in Sketched Linear Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24316)
*Ziyan Chen,Ding-Xuan Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了草图线性回归中的批缩放定律，分析了三种批SGD方法（单遍、多遍有放回、多遍无放回）的风险分解和缩放行为，揭示了批大小对误差项的影响规律，特别是无放回采样更优且当批大小等于数据量时退化为确定性梯度下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有缩放定律主要针对单样本SGD或全数据重用，缺乏对mini-batching作用的清晰理论理解。本文旨在建立批大小与计算量、模型尺寸、数据量等同等的理论地位。

Method: 在幂律协方差谱和目标参数的源条件下，对单遍批SGD、多遍有放回批SGD、多遍无放回批SGD进行风险分解，分析各部分的缩放指数。

Result: 三种方法共享不可约项和逼近项；随机项依赖于采样协议。单遍批SGD中方差随批大小以O(1/B)降低但在单遍模式下部分被优化时程缩短抵消。多遍方法中无放回采样噪声小于有放回，且B=N时无波动项，恢复确定性梯度下降。

Conclusion: 批大小可与计算量、数据量、模型维度在同一理论框架下处理，为批训练的理论理解提供了统一视角。

Abstract: Scaling laws provide compact descriptions of how prediction error varies with compute, model size, and data, but existing theory mainly treats single-sample SGD or full data reuse, leaving the role of mini-batching unclear. We study batch scaling laws for sketched linear regression under a power-law covariance spectrum and a source condition on the target parameter. We analyze one-pass batch SGD, multi-pass batch SGD with replacement, and multi-pass batch SGD without replacement. Our first result is a risk decomposition: all three procedures share the same irreducible and approximation terms, while their stochastic terms depend on the sampling protocol. One-pass batch SGD splits into bias and variance, whereas the two multi-pass methods split into GD bias, GD variance, and a fluctuation term around a common GD reference trajectory. We then prove source-condition scaling laws for one-pass and multi-pass mini-batch methods. For one-pass batch SGD, mini-batching preserves the approximation and optimization-bias exponents, while the variance scales as $O(\min(M,(T_{\mathrm{eff}}γ)^{1/a})/(B T_{\mathrm{eff}}))$. Thus the usual $1/B$ covariance reduction holds at fixed update count $T$, but in the one-pass regime $T=N/B$ it is partly offset by the shorter optimization horizon. For multi-pass batch SGD, with- and without-replacement sampling have identical approximation and GD bias/variance terms; they differ only in the fluctuation covariance prefactor, which is $1/B$ with replacement and $ρ_{N,B}=(N-B)/(B(N-1))$ without replacement. Hence without-replacement sampling is less noisy for $B>1$, and when $B=N$ the fluctuation vanishes, recovering deterministic gradient descent. These results place batch size on the same theoretical footing as compute, data, and model dimension in sketched linear regression.

</details>


### [451] [Omissive Bias in Religious Representation: Benchmarking LLM Answers to Everyday Ethical Decision-making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24319)
*David Wingate,Sheryl Carty,Joshua Coates,Daniel Feldman,Nancy Fulda,Larry Howell,Brett Israelson,Dallin Jacobs,Jonathan Karr,John Paul Kimes,Elisabeth Kincaid,Paul Martens,Gavin Mobley,Suzana Pinheiro,Lindsay Slemboski,Peter Whiting*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"省略性偏见"概念，即LLMs在回答开放性伦理问题时系统性地省略宗教视角。作者构建了AllFaith基准测试（150个伦理问题），评估27个模型发现：LLMs在抽象存在性问题（如生命意义）中会提及宗教，但在实际个人困境（如悲伤、婚姻、成瘾）中却很少引用宗教，这与人类预期存在显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当LLMs成为人们获取个人、道德和存在性问题指导的默认来源时，它们是否借鉴了历史上塑造这类推理的宗教框架，还是系统地忽略了它们？现有基准多关注政治倾向或社会偏见的存在，但忽视了宗教代表性缺失这一维度。

Method: 构建AllFaith宗教代表性基准：150个来自真实聊天记录和信仰社区贡献者的伦理与个人问题，配合LLM-as-judge评估方法（只要提及任何宗教、宗教实践或宗教领袖即给满分）。同时进行人类受试者调查，比较LLM行为与人类期望的差异。评估了27个模型。

Result: LLMs一致地低估了宗教代表性，与人类预期相比存在显著不足。这种省略是不对称的：模型在抽象存在性问题（意义、死亡、真理）上更愿意提及宗教，但在实用个人情境（悲伤、婚姻、家庭冲突、成瘾）中——正是许多人最依赖宗教支持的领域——却较少引用宗教。

Conclusion: 并非要裁定LLMs应持有何种价值观，而是指出当前LLM回复忽视了反映宗教框架的关键机会，而许多人在应对个人和伦理挑战时正是依赖这些框架的。

Abstract: As large language models become a default source of guidance on personal, moral, and existential questions, it matters whether they draw on the religious frameworks that have historically shaped such reasoning, or systematically omit them. In this paper, we ask a deliberately narrow question: when posed an everyday ethical question for which religious perspectives may be valuable, do LLMs invoke religion at all? In contrast to benchmarks that look for the presence of political leanings or social bias, we look for the absence of religious representation as a dimension of value alignment and bias in LLMs. We term this ``omissive bias.''
  To measure omissive bias, we contribute the AllFaith Religious Representation Benchmark: 150 ethically and personally salient questions, sourced from in-the-wild chat transcripts and faith-community contributors, paired with an LLM-as-judge rubric that gives full credit for any mention of a religion, a religious practice, or a religious leader. The questions are not themselves about religion--they are open-ended questions about grief, forgiveness, relationships, purpose, and honesty, where religion is one valuable perspective among several. We also run a human-subjects survey to compare LLM behavior against human expectations.
  Evaluating 27 models, we find that LLMs consistently underrepresent religion relative to human expectations. The omission is asymmetric: models invoke religion more readily for abstract existential questions (meaning, death, truth) than for the practical personal situations--grief, marriage, family conflict, addiction--where many people most rely on it. It is not our purpose to adjudicate which values LLMs should hold. We argue, more modestly, that current LLM responses overlook critical opportunities to reflect religious frameworks that many people draw on when navigating personal and ethical challenges.

</details>


### [452] [Interdomain Attention: Beyond Token-Level Key-Value Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24330)
*Naoki Kiyohara,Harrison Bo Hua Zhu,Riccardo El Hassanin,Zhuo Sun,Wenlong Chen,Samir Bhatt,Yingzhen Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Interdomain Attention，通过核方法将SSM集成到注意力模块中，用固定大小的循环状态和查询条件投影替代传统KV缓存，在1.3B模型上超越标准softmax注意力，并保持长序列的平坦性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer的注意力机制需要KV缓存且成本随序列二次增长，而深度SSM虽有固定大小状态但缺乏内容寻址能力。作者希望结合两者优点，设计一种既可内容寻址又保持固定状态开销的token混合器。

Method: 通过核方法近似注意力核（有限特征映射），将key特征和value投影到一组由单SSM循环维护的共享基函数上，每个query通过自身特征映射关注压缩后的系数，从而实现查询条件化的固定状态注意力。可扩展层是该推导的学习松弛版本。

Result: 在125M到1.3B的自回归语言模型（FineWeb-Edu）上，Interdomain Attention在同等循环状态预算下全面超越SSM混合器，1.3B模型在验证困惑度和8任务常识推理套件上超越同配置softmax基线，且继承固定状态核心的长度平坦行为，可外推至训练上下文的3.5倍。

Conclusion: 查询条件化投影是性能提升的主要来源，Interdomain Attention成功融合了注意力的内容寻址能力和SSM的固定状态效率，是一种有前景的高效长序列建模方案。

Abstract: Transformers and deep state space models (SSMs) sit at opposite ends of a basic design choice: attention routes each query through a growing key-value (KV) cache by content-based matching at quadratic cost, while deep SSMs compress context into a fixed-size recurrent state that is not directly addressed by query-key matching. We propose Interdomain Attention, which integrates an SSM into an attention module through kernel methods: an attention kernel is approximated by a finite feature map, the resulting key features and values are projected onto a shared set of basis functions maintained by a single SSM recurrence, and each query attends to the compressed coefficients through its own feature map, recovering query-conditioned attention over a fixed-size state. The scalable layer is a learned relaxation of this derivation, and we validate its components through ablations. In a 125M to 1.3B autoregressive language-modeling study on FineWeb-Edu at matched recurrent-state budget, Interdomain Attention improves on an SSM token mixer at every scale, surpasses a same-recipe softmax baseline at 1.3B on validation perplexity and on the eight-task commonsense suite, and inherits the length-flat behavior of its fixed-state core out to 3.5x the training context. Ablations indicate that the query-conditioned projection is the main source of the gain.

</details>


### [453] [CurveRL: Principled Distribution-Aware Context Reweighting for LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24331)
*Ke Sun,Yizhou Zhao,Jiayi Xin,Qi Long,Weijie Su*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CurveRL，一种基于分位数坐标变换的分布感知提示重加权方法，在RLVR框架下统一了现有加权方案并显著优于GRPO等基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管提示重加权在RLVR中广泛使用，但其最优权重原则尚不明确。本文旨在从函数导数视角统一现有加权方案，并探索分布感知的权重设计。

Method: 将提示重加权形式化为通过率函数空间上效用泛函的泛函导数，得到统一最优性框架；进而提出基于分位数坐标变换的CurveRL方法，权重取决于通过率的秩与密度而非绝对值。

Result: 在多个基准测试中，CurveRL在推理能力上持续优于GRPO及其他RLVR基线方法。

Conclusion: 提示重加权的最优设计应基于通过率的分布结构，而非绝对值；上下文分布控制是RLVR算法设计与分析的一个原则性新维度。

Abstract: Context or prompt-level reweighting has emerged as a central algorithmic lever in Reinforcement Learning with Verified Rewards (RLVR) for improving the reasoning capability of large language models, yet the principle determining what constitutes an optimal weighting remains poorly understood. We address this gap by formulating prompt reweighting as a functional derivative of a utility functional defined in the pass-rate function space, yielding a unified optimality framework that accommodates existing schemes, including REINFORCE and GRPO. Building on this optimality framework, we propose a distribution-aware prompt reweighting approach, called CurveRL, based on a quantile coordinate transform, in which the weight assigned to each prompt depends not on the absolute value of pass rates but on its rank and density to reflect the distributional structure of the pass rates in the learning dynamics. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed CurveRL consistently outperforms GRPO and other RLVR baselines. Our study identifies context-distribution control as a principled axis for analyzing and designing prompt-reweighted RLVR algorithms. The code is released in https://github.com/zhyzmath/CurveRL.

</details>


### [454] [ChainzRule: Sample-Efficient, Robust Deep Learning Across Tabular, NLP, and Vision Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24340)
*Rowan Martnishn*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ChainzRule (CR)是一种用可学习多项式层替代传统激活函数的神经网络架构，配合微分正则化（DREG）在推理成本不变的情况下计算层间雅可比惩罚项，通过限制中间导数迫使网络学习低频、结构稳定的表征，从而减少对标注数据的依赖、提升鲁棒性并提供可测量的梯度解释能力。在五个领域（Pima糖尿病、SST-5情感分类、Yelp Full序数回归、CIFAR-10-C等）上均取得优于SVM/XGBoost/RNTN/BERT-base等基线的结果，且梯度尾比（p99/mean）稳定在1.01-1.02，远优于传统激活函数的1.07-1.09。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际生产环境中的深度学习系统面临着标注数据昂贵、推理预算紧张、模型缺乏可解释性等约束，而学术基准测试往往掩盖了这些问题。现有模型在数据效率、推理成本控制和可解释性方面难以满足企业级部署需求。

Method: 提出ChainzRule (CR)架构，用可学习多项式层替换标准激活函数，并引入微分正则化（DREG）——在前向传播过程中以标准推理成本解析计算逐层Jacobian惩罚项。通过限制中间层导数，迫使网络学习低频、结构稳定的表征。

Result: Pima糖尿病: 85.71%±2.01%（优于SVM和XGBoost）；SST-5（冻结编码器）: 46.20%±0.37%（优于RNTN，仅用其约5%训练数据）；SST-5（微调BERT）: 55.79%（优于BERT-base线性头的54.9%）；Yelp Full: 70.17%（3.2M参数vs10模型平均66.35%）；CIFAR-10-C: +2.32%平均损坏精度。所有p值经Bonferroni校正后均低于α=0.05。梯度尾比τ为1.01-1.02，远优于基线1.07-1.09。

Conclusion: CR架构通过可学习多项式层和微分正则化，在数据效率、推理成本、鲁棒性和可解释性之间取得了优于传统方法的效果。梯度尾比τ（p99/mean）作为结构不变性指标，被提出为样本效率的机制驱动因素，并可作为部署时模型可靠性的代理指标。

Abstract: Production deep learning systems across enterprise domains operate under constraints that academic benchmarks routinely obscure: labeled data is expensive, inference budgets are tight, and models that cannot explain their behavior are difficult to trust and maintain. We present ChainzRule (CR), a neural architecture replacing typical activations with learnable polynomial layers governed by Differential Regularization (DREG), a layer-wise Jacobian penalty computed analytically during the forward pass at standard inference cost. The core claim is that bounding intermediate derivatives forces the network toward low-frequency, structurally stable representations, simultaneously reducing dependence on labeled data volume, improving robustness to distribution shift, and providing a measurable, gradient-based handle on model behavior. Evaluated across five domains, CR achieves $85.71\% \pm 2.01\%$ on Pima Diabetes (statistically superior to SVM and XGBoost), $46.20\% \pm 0.37\%$ on SST-5 sentiment classification with a frozen encoder (superior to RNTN using approximately 5\% of its training data), $55.79\%$ on SST-5 with a fine-tuned BERT backbone (versus BERT-base linear head at $54.9\%$), $70.17\%$ on Yelp Full ordinal regression with 3.2M parameters versus a 10-model average of $66.35\%$, and $+2.32\%$ mean corruption accuracy on CIFAR-10-C. All results with reported $p$-values fall below the $α= 0.05$ threshold after Bonferroni correction. CR maintains a gradient tail ratio $τ$ (p99/mean) of $1.01$--$1.02$ against $1.07$--$1.09$ for all typical activation function baselines across every data fraction, a structural invariant we propose as the mechanistic driver of sample efficiency and a deployment-time proxy for model reliability.

</details>


### [455] [Evolving Robustness--Exploration Trade-off in Online Reinforcement Learning via Quantile Bayesian Risk MDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24345)
*Meichen Song,Yuhao Wang,Enlu Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过分位数贝叶斯风险感知MDP框架，研究在线强化学习中随数据积累动态变化的鲁棒性与探索之间的权衡，并提出自适应分位数调度算法，在探索需求高和探索成本高的环境中均表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线强化学习中，早期数据稀缺导致认知不确定性，此时鲁棒性至关重要；而后续又需要充分探索以学到真实环境的最优策略。现有方法难以动态平衡这种随时间变化的鲁棒性-探索权衡。

Method: 提出分位数贝叶斯风险感知MDP（BR-MDP），其中分位数水平控制后验不确定性如何进入Bellman备份。通过渐近正态性分析刻画分位数水平对乐观/悲观程度的影响，并设计自适应分位数调度算法：早期强调鲁棒性，逐步鼓励探索未充分访问的状态-动作对。

Result: 建立了关于真实最优值和最优BR-MDP鲁棒值的亚线性贝叶斯遗憾界。数值实验表明，该方法在探索需求高和探索成本高的环境中均表现优异。

Conclusion: 分位数BR-MDP框架能够有效解释并利用乐观/悲观程度随数据积累自然衰减的特性，自适应分位数调度策略成功实现了鲁棒性与探索的动态平衡。

Abstract: In online reinforcement learning, data scarcity creates epistemic uncertainty that makes robustness important early in learning, whereas sufficient exploration is needed to learn the true-environment optimal policy. We study this time-varying robustness--exploration trade-off through a quantile Bayesian risk-aware Markov decision process (BR-MDP), in which the quantile level controls how posterior uncertainty enters the Bellman backup. We characterize this control through an asymptotic normality result for the difference between the quantile BR-MDP value and the value in the true environment. The result implies that upper/lower-tail quantiles induce optimism/pessimism towards epistemic uncertainty, and the magnitude of the optimism/pessimism decreases as data accumulate. Building on this characterization, we propose an online Bayesian risk-aware algorithm with an adaptive quantile schedule that emphasizes robustness early and gradually encourages exploration of less-visited state--action pairs. We establish sublinear Bayesian regret bounds with respect to both the true optimal value and the optimal BR-MDP robust value. Numerical experiments demonstrate strong performance in both exploration-demanding and exploration-costly environments.

</details>


### [456] [Refined Analysis of Entropy-Regularized Actor-Critic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24357)
*Safwan Labbi,Paul Mangold,Daniil Tiapkin,Eric Moulines*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了熵正则化折扣有限环境中actor-critic方法的critic作用，证明当critic精确时，将其作为baseline能实现强方差缩减，使随机梯度actor-critic达到与确定性策略梯度相同的样本复杂度（$\tilde{O}(\log(1/\epsilon))$）。当critic误差足够小时，方差缩减和快速收敛得以保持，这强调了准确估计critic的重要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深入理解actor-critic方法中critic的理论作用，特别是其作为baseline对actor更新的方差缩减效果，以及在熵正则化框架下的样本复杂度。

Method: 通过理论分析，分别在critic精确和学习两种情况下，研究critic对actor随机梯度更新的方差和偏差影响，分析算法的样本复杂度。

Result: 精确critic可达到$\tilde{O}(\log(1/\epsilon))$的样本复杂度；学习critic时，只要误差足够小，方差缩减和快速收敛性质可保持。

Conclusion: 准确的critic估计对actor-critic方法的成功至关重要，建议先学习critic并在每次actor更新后保持其更新。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the role of the critic in actor--critic for entropy-regularized, finite, discounted environments. We establish that, when the critic is exact, using the latter as a baseline is a variance-reduction method in a strong sense. In this case, actor--critic with stochastic gradients matches the sample complexity of deterministic policy gradient, reaching an $ε$-optimal regularized value with $\tilde{O}(\log(1/ε))$ samples. In practice, the critic is learned alongside the actor: the variance of the actor update is then influenced by the critic's variance and bias. Specifically, when the critic has a sufficiently small error, the variance reduction and rapid convergence are preserved. This suggests to learn the critic first, keeping it up to date after each actor update, underscoring the crucial role of accurate critic estimation in actor--critic methods.

</details>


### [457] [Treatment Effect Estimation with Differentiated Networked Effect on Graph Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24358)
*Xiaofeng Lin,Han Bao,Hisashi Kashima*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的干扰建模机制，通过部分注意力机制和消息放大器捕获差异化网络效应（DNE），以提升图数据中个体治疗效果（ITE）的估计精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ITE估计方法忽略了邻居节点重要性不同和规模差异导致的差异化网络效应（DNE），导致干扰刻画不准确，进而影响决策质量。

Method: 提出包含两种部分注意力机制（估计不同邻居对干扰的重要性）和消息放大器（根据邻居规模调整干扰建模结果）的新型干扰建模机制，以显式捕获DNE。

Result: 在三个真实世界图数据上的实验表明，该方法优于现有图数据ITE估计方法，验证了显式捕获DNE的重要性。

Conclusion: 差异化网络效应（DNE）是图数据ITE估计中不可忽视的关键因素，所提机制能有效提升估计精度。

Abstract: Estimating individual treatment effect (ITE) from observational graph data is crucial for decision-making in the fields such as commerce and medicine. This task is challenging due to interference, where individual outcomes can be influenced by the treatments and covariates of their neighbors. Existing methods attempt to model such interference for accurate ITE estimation. However, a critical issue is often overlooked: differentiated networked effect (DNE), an effect caused by local networks consisting of neighbors with varying importance and scales. Capturing DNE is vital; otherwise, we will end up with imprecise ITE estimation due to an erroneous characterization of interference, which can result in misguided decisions. To address this challenge, we propose a novel interference modeling mechanism that incorporates two partial attention mechanisms and a message amplifier. The partial attention mechanisms automatically estimate the importance of different neighbors in contributing to interference, while the message amplifier adjusts the results of the interference modeling mechanism based on the scale of neighbors, all of which enables the model to capture DNE. Experiments on three real-world graphs demonstrate that our methods outperform existing approaches for ITE estimation from graph data, which corroborates the importance of explicitly capturing DNE.

</details>


### [458] [GEESE: Genotype-aware End-to-End Spatio-temporal Embedding for Behavioral Phenotyping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24370)
*Yiran Ding,Yuen Gao,Chunqi Qian,Zijun Cui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GEESE是一个端到端深度学习框架，直接从3D姿态动力学学习行为表征，用于遗传动物模型的行为表型分析，在三种自闭症相关基因模型上超越手工特征基线，并提供了无需编程的交互工具HONK。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遗传动物模型的行为表型分析依赖人工特征工程，既费时费力又缺乏可重复性和可扩展性，亟需自动化、可复现的表型分析方法。

Method: 采用预训练的时间序列基础模型，将运动序列编码到行为流形中，支持行为分类和基因型预测两个任务；同时开发HONK交互工具，支持自然语言交互的行为表型分析。

Result: 在CNTNAP2、CHD8、FMR1三种自闭症相关基因模型上，GEESE在行为分类和基因型预测两个任务中均超越了手工特征基线，且能泛化到不同遗传背景，全队列模型可仅从运动模式识别遗传背景和基因型。

Conclusion: 学习的表征能够捕获基因型特异的行为特征，该框架具有良好的泛化能力，且通过HONK工具降低了使用门槛。

Abstract: Behavioral phenotyping of genetic animal models currently requires labor-intensive manual feature engineering that limits reproducibility and scalability. We present GEESE, an end-to-end deep learning framework that learns behavioral representations directly from 3D pose dynamics without hand-crafted features. Using a pretrained time series foundation model, we encode movement sequences into a behavioral manifold that supports both behavior classification and genotype prediction. Evaluated across three autism-associated genetic models (CNTNAP2, CHD8, FMR1), our deep learning approach surpasses hand-crafted feature baselines in both tasks, revealing that learned representations capture genotype-specific behavioral signatures. The framework generalizes across genetic backgrounds, and an all-cohort model identifies both genetic background and genotype from movement patterns alone. We further provide HONK, an interactive intelligent tool enabling researchers without programming expertise to perform behavioral phenotyping from pose data through natural language interaction.

</details>


### [459] [Assessing the Operational Viability of Foundation Models for Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24381)
*Kavin Soni,Debanshu Das,Vamshi Guduguntla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了时序预测基础模型与监督学习方法在四种运营场景（周期性系统、物理约束过程、金融市场、异构需求预测）中的表现，提出了一种基于特征选择的复杂度路由器（Complexity Router），能够根据序列特征动态分配最优模型类别，在保证精度的同时显著降低推理成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大规模时序基础模型的涌现，它们作为零样本替代方案展现出潜力，但现有研究多关注整体精度，缺乏对基础模型与监督学习方法在不同运营场景下实际适用性的系统性对比分析。

Method: 本文在四种运营场景（周期性人机系统、物理约束过程、随机金融市场、异构需求预测）中进行对比实验，并提出了一个基于经验特征的复杂度路由器，用于将每条序列分配给最优模型类别。

Result: 基础模型在具有可迁移周期结构的领域表现良好，适合冷启动或长尾场景；监督方法在严格物理约束系统中精度更高；金融领域中新基础模型正快速缩小差距；复杂度路由器实现了更高的精度和更低的推理成本。

Conclusion: 不同场景需差异化选择模型，统一的权衡框架（复杂度路由器）能够在泛化性与效率之间取得平衡，为实际部署提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Time series forecasting drives operational decisions in areas like finance, transportation, and energy. While supervised learning approaches achieve strong performance, they require domain-specific training, feature engineering, and ongoing maintenance. Large-scale foundation models have recently emerged as a zero-shot alternative, avoiding task-specific training much like LLMs. In this work, we evaluate foundation models against standard supervised approaches. Rather than focusing solely on aggregate accuracy, we analyze performance across four operational regimes: periodic human-centric systems, physically constrained processes, stochastic financial markets, and heterogeneous demand forecasting.
  Our results characterize optimal deployment areas. Foundation models perform well in domains with transferable periodic structures and are efficient for cold-start or long-tail scenarios. Conversely, supervised specialists maintain higher precision in systems governed by strict physical constraints. In financial domains, newer foundation models are rapidly closing the performance gap with supervised specialists. We further quantify trade-offs in inference latency, data drift adaptability, and deployment constraints. Finally, we propose a Complexity Router that assigns each series to the optimal model class using empirical features. We demonstrate that this selective routing achieves higher accuracy and significantly lower inference costs compared to deploying a universal foundation model, providing a practical framework for balancing generalization and efficiency.

</details>


### [460] [Learning Laplacian Eigenspace with Mass-Aware Neural Operators on Point Clouds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24390)
*Zherui Yang,Tao Du,Ligang Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出神经特征空间算子(NEO)，通过前馈网络直接从点云预测拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子的低频谱，用稳定子空间学习替代病态的特征向量回归，实现近线性加速和零样本泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统迭代求解器在大规模点云上计算LBO低频谱成本高昂，且标准特征向量回归存在符号翻转和旋转歧义等病态问题。

Method: 1) 学习稳定的低维子空间而非具体特征向量，预测冗余基函数后通过Rayleigh-Ritz精炼恢复准确特征对；2) 引入质量感知神经算子，将逐点面积权重融入注意力聚合机制，增强对非均匀采样的鲁棒性。

Result: 近线性运行时间，相比迭代求解器有显著加速且精度相当；零样本泛化到高分辨率点云；支持标准谱几何任务，基函数可作为下游学习特征。

Conclusion: NEO成功将LBO谱计算从昂贵的迭代过程变为高效的前馈预测，通过子空间学习解决了歧义问题，质量感知设计保证了跨分辨率的泛化能力。

Abstract: The eigendecomposition of the Laplace--Beltrami Operator (LBO) is fundamental to geometric analysis, yet computing its low-frequency eigenmodes remains a significant bottleneck due to the high cost of iterative solvers on large-scale data. To amortize this cost, we introduce the Neural Eigenspace Operator (NEO), a feed-forward framework designed to predict the spectrum directly from point clouds. Crucially, NEO circumvents the ill-posed nature of standard eigenvector regression, which suffers from intrinsic sign flips and rotation ambiguities, by learning the stable, invariant low-frequency subspace instead. Specifically, the network predicts a redundant set of basis functions whose span robustly covers the target eigenspace, allowing for the recovery of accurate eigenpairs via a lightweight Rayleigh--Ritz refinement. To handle irregular sampling, we propose a mass-aware neural operator that incorporates per-point area weights into attention-based aggregation, improving robustness to non-uniform densities and enabling zero-shot generalization across resolutions. Our approach achieves near-linear runtime scaling and substantial wall-clock speedups over iterative solvers at comparable accuracy, and exhibits strong zero-shot transfer to high-resolution point clouds. The resulting eigenpairs support standard spectral geometry tasks, while the raw basis functions provide effective point-wise features for downstream learning. Code: https://github.com/Adversarr/NEO.

</details>


### [461] [AvAtar: Learning to Align via Active Optimal Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24395)
*Qi Yu,Ruizhong Qiu,Zhichen Zeng,My T. Thai,Huan Liu,Hanghang Tong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AvAtar，一种基于最优传输的主动对齐框架，通过梯度传播量化候选点信息量，并利用伴随状态法高效求解，在多个对齐任务中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有最优传输对齐方法依赖稀疏且昂贵的标注，缺乏主动获取高质量监督信息以提升对齐性能的机制。

Method: 通过熵正则化OT公式，从全局对齐结果向候选点的监督信息传播梯度，量化信息量；利用伴随状态法将梯度计算转化为线性系统，用共轭梯度法高效求解。

Result: 在三种代表性对齐任务上验证了AvAtar的有效性、可扩展性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: AvAtar为OT框架下的对齐问题提供了一种主动获取高质量监督的通用方案，兼顾理论严谨性与实际效率。

Abstract: Alignment plays a fundamental role in many machine learning problems, such as multi-network analysis, multimodal learning, and point cloud registration. Recent works increasingly leverage optimal transport (OT) for distributional alignment, whose effectiveness largely depends on sparse supervision that is hard or costly to obtain in practice. Existing works, however, largely overlook how to actively acquire high-quality supervision to improve their alignment performance under OT frameworks. In this paper, we propose a principled active alignment framework for optimal transport alignment called AvAtar. We quantify the informativeness of a candidate by measuring its gradient-based impact on the global alignment result, computed as the gradient propagation from the global alignment result to all possible supervisions of the candidate through the entropy-regularized OT formulation. While differentiating through OT is challenging given its constrained nature, we leverage the adjoint-state method to reformulate the computation to a linear system solvable by the conjugate gradient method with linear complexity and guaranteed convergence. By encoding the global alignment result via effective utility functions, AvAtar is applicable to general alignment problems under the OT framework. Extensive experiments on three representative alignment tasks demonstrate the effectiveness, scalability, and generalizability of the proposed AvAtar.

</details>


### [462] [Generative OOD-regularized Model-based Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24405)
*Aysin Tumay,Jiahe Huang,Elise Jortberg,Rose Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GORMPO，一种基于生成式密度估计的离线强化学习算法，通过在稀疏状态-动作空间中限制策略更新到高密度区域来避免OOD动作，在真实医疗数据集上超SOTA 17%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统离线RL策略在稀疏状态-动作空间中因依赖稀疏离线表示容易产生OOD动作，导致不安全策略，因此需要探索如何集成密度估计模型到基于模型的RL方法中以避免OOD区域。

Method: 提出GORMPO框架，利用生成式密度模型显式建模稀疏状态-动作空间中的密度，通过密度正则化将策略更新限制在数据集的高密度区域。

Result: 在真实医疗数据集上超越SOTA基线17%；在离线RL数据集上提升基础模型性能。理论上在温和假设下保证了GORMPO的性能。

Conclusion: 更好的OOD检测通常能在动态稳定的环境中带来更好的策略；当动态不确定时，带有保守惩罚但密度估计较差的方法更受青睐。

Abstract: We study sequential decision-making with offline reinforcement learning (RL). Traditional offline RL policies may result in out-of-distribution (OOD) actions when training relies only on sparse offline representations. To ensure safe offline policies in a sparse state-action space, we explore how density estimation models can be integrated into model-based RL methods to avoid the OOD regions. Generative models are capable of explicitly modeling the density in sparse state-action spaces. Building on this, we introduce Generative OOD-regularized Model-based Policy Optimization (GORMPO), a density-regularized offline RL algorithm that uses generative density modeling to restrict policy updates to high-density areas of the dataset. Furthermore, we examine whether better OOD detection corresponds to better model-based offline policies. We compare (1) the OOD detection capabilities of various density estimators and (2) their performance within the GORMPO framework on a real-world medical dataset and sparse offline RL datasets. We theoretically guarantee GORMPO's performance under mild assumptions. Empirically, GORMPO outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by 17% on a real-world medical dataset and enhances the base model on the offline RL datasets. Our empirical findings show that better OOD detection generally results in improved policies in environments with stable dynamics, while conservative penalties with poor density estimation are favored when dynamics are uncertain.

</details>


### [463] [A Unified Python Framework for Direct PPO-based Control of AHUs with Economizer Logic and CO2-Constrained Ventilation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24406)
*Erfan Haghighat Damavandi,Davide Papurello,Mahdi Alibeigi,Armin Keshavarz,Simone Canevarolo,Marco Condo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习（PPO算法）的HVAC优化方法，结合二阶RC热模型、CO2动态质量平衡、分层流量逻辑和焓经济器，实验表明PPO agent在温度稳定性和能效上优于PID和On-Off控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统控制方法（如PID、On-Off）难以应对建筑围护结构的非线性和随机负荷变化，导致HVAC系统能效低下，亟需更智能的优化方法。

Method: 采用DRL中的PPO算法，构建二阶RC热模型与CO2质量平衡模型；创新提出“分层流量逻辑”确保IAQ（CO2<1000ppm），并引入焓经济器实现免费冷却，在自定义Python环境中训练与测试。

Result: 实验表明，PPO agent相比GA调参的PID和传统On-Off控制，在温度稳定性和总体能效上均表现更优。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了端到端的鲁棒、通用解决方案，为实现真实硬件场景下的智能建筑能源管理奠定了基础。

Abstract: Optimizing HVAC (Heating, Ventilation and Air Conditioning) can enhance a building's energy efficiency while providing comfort levels for its occupants. Using conventional control systems to maintain HVAC functions is often difficult because of the nonlinear characteristics of a building envelope as it experiences stochastic load variations over time. This paper presents a new approach to optimizing HVAC systems through the use of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms and the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm implemented in a custom Python performance environment. The DRL system uses a second order resistor-capacitor thermal model and an integrated dynamic mass balance of CO2 to replicate the complex physics associated with buildings. One major innovation of this study is a "Hierarchical Flow Logic," which provides the means to ensure that indoor air quality (IAQ) is maintained by overriding the accepted actions of the agent that cause CO2 to exceed 1000 ppm. In addition, an enthalpy-based economiser is used to create free cooling from the outdoor environment. The experimental data shows that compared to PID controllers tuned by GA or traditional On-Off controls, a PPO agent has better temperature stability and energy efficiency overall. An end-to-end pipeline provides an avenue for robust and generalized solutions to help implement smart building energy management within the context of real hardware implementation.

</details>


### [464] [Synheart Capacity: A Theory-Driven Physiological Representation of Cognitive Capacity Dynamics from Wearable Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24416)
*Yisak Debele,Henok Ademtew,Israel Goytom*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种理论驱动的多模态学习框架，通过心脏和皮电信号的双流编码，在努力-压力二维空间中连续估计认知能力状态，在SWELL-KW数据集上验证了跨个体泛化能力（压力70.0%，努力72.2%），为自适应人机交互提供了基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类认知表现受有限心理资源约束，但如何连续计算估计认知能力动态仍是一个开放挑战。现有方法通常将生理动态坍缩为单一工作负荷标签，无法区分不同的认知状态（如高效投入与超负荷压力）。

Method: 提出理论驱动的多模态学习框架，将认知能力状态建模为资源分配（努力）和超负荷压力（压力）的二维生理表征。架构包含心脏信号和皮电信号的双流编码、后期融合以及独立输出头，分别概率估计努力和压力状态。使用严格留一被试交叉验证在SWELL-KW数据集上评估。

Result: 跨个体泛化：压力平衡准确率70.0%，努力平衡准确率72.2%。多模态融合和理论引导监督带来显著性能提升。努力-压力状态空间能够结构化区分不同认知状态，预测轨迹在工作负荷操控下表现出显著的需求敏感性差异。

Conclusion: 生理基础的多维状态表征为构建连续认知能力感知的自适应系统和以人为中心的交互提供了基础。

Abstract: Human cognitive performance is constrained by limited mental resources, yet continuous computational estimation of cognitive capacity dynamics remains an open challenge. We propose a theory-driven multimodal learning framework that models capacity-related cognitive state as a two-dimensional physiological representation defined by voluntary resource allocation (mental effort) and overload-related strain (stress). The proposed architecture combines dual-stream encoding of cardiac (IBI/HRV) and electrodermal (EDA) signals with late fusion and task-specific output heads that independently estimate probabilistic effort and stress states.
  Evaluation on the SWELL-KW dataset using strict leave-one-subject-out cross-validation demonstrates cross-individual generalization (stress: 70.0\% balanced accuracy; effort: 72.2\%), with significant gains from multimodal integration and theory-guided supervision. Rather than collapsing physiological dynamics into a single workload label, the proposed effort--stress state-space enables structured differentiation between distinct cognitive regimes, including productive engagement and overload-related strain. Predicted state trajectories exhibit significant demand-sensitive shifts under controlled workload manipulations, with effort and stress responding differentially across interruption and time-pressure conditions.
  These results suggest that physiologically grounded multidimensional state representations may provide a foundation for adaptive systems capable of continuous capacity-aware monitoring and human-centered interaction.

</details>


### [465] [LLMTabBench: Evaluating LLMs on Binary Tabular Classification From Zero to Few Shots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24417)
*Daria Grushina,Kseniia Kuvshinova,Alina Kostromina,Aziz Temirkhanov,Mile Mitrovic,Dmitry Simakov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LLMTabBench基准，系统评估LLM在小样本表格分类任务中的表现，发现LLM在零样本下极具竞争力，但增加样本可能与先验知识冲突，且存在数据复杂度阈值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统监督分类依赖大量标注数据，在小样本场景下受限。虽然TabPFN等专用方法表现优异，但仍需标注样本；LLM可通过上下文学习灵活处理，但在表格数据上表现不一致且理解不足，因此需系统评估LLM在此场景下的能力边界。

Method: 构建LLMTabBench基准，系统评估LLM在数据稀缺条件下的表格分类能力，探究先验知识与上下文信息（任务描述、小样本示例）的交互，以及性能随数据复杂度的扩展规律，使用真实与受控合成数据集。

Result: (1) LLM在零样本场景下极具竞争力，甚至优于使用小样本的替代方法；(2) 增加小样本示例可能与LLM先验知识冲突，限制甚至降低性能；(3) 存在数据复杂度阈值，超过后LLM性能下降且小样本示例效果减弱。

Conclusion: 揭示了上下文学习在表格数据上的基本约束，为低数据场景下部署LLM提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Supervised classification for tabular data remains a core machine learning task, yet its reliance on large labeled datasets limits applicability in data-scarce domains. For such few-shot scenarios, specialized methods like TabPFN - a state-of-the-art Prior-Data Fitted Network - have set a high standard by leveraging large-scale synthetic pretraining, though they still require a context of labeled examples to function. In contrast, Large Language Models (LLMs) could offer a more flexible alternative via zero- and few-shot in-context learning directly from task descriptions, but their performance on tabular data remains inconsistent and poorly understood. We introduce LLMTabBench, a benchmark designed to systematically evaluate LLMs for tabular classification under data-scarce conditions. LLMTabBench explicitly probes (i) how LLM prior knowledge interacts with in-context information (task descriptions and few-shot examples), and (ii) how model performance scales with increasing data complexity, using both real-world and controlled synthetic datasets. Our findings include: (1) LLMs are highly competitive in zero-shot settings and can outperform alternative models, even when those models have access to few-shot examples; (2) incorporating additional few-shot examples can conflict with LLM prior knowledge, limiting or even degrading performance; and (3) there is a data complexity threshold beyond which LLMs' performance declines and few-shot examples become less effective. Together, these findings reveal fundamental constraints of in-context learning for tabular data and provide practical guidance for deploying LLMs in low-data regimes.

</details>


### [466] [ChainLearn: A Blockchain-Based Capacity-Aware Framework for Federated Ensemble Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24418)
*Karan Sharma,Aditya Tripathi,Rahul Mishra,Tapas Kumar Maiti*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种面向医学影像的异构联邦学习方法，通过容量感知协调（根据医院算力分配不同架构）、链上链下分离（智能合约存储元数据，训练在本地）实现高效、隐私保护的联邦学习，通信开销仅为每轮224字节（比FedAvg降低91.2万倍）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准联邦学习假设同质硬件、统一架构和中心化聚合，无法处理医院间算力不均的问题（如大医院可部署ResNet-50，小医院只能跑MobileNet）。现有方法强制所有参与者使用相同模型，导致弱算力节点无法参与或性能受限。

Method: 1) 容量感知协调：测量各医院吞吐量，分配适配的架构（MobileNetV3-Small/EfficientNet-B0/ResNet-50），通过加权集成融合预测。2) 链上链下分离：用Solidity智能合约存储医院注册信息、基准哈希、指标和权重，医院本地训练后仅提交哈希和标量，加权集成推理在链下完成。

Result: 在PneumoniaMNIST和DermaMNIST上（5个随机种子、3个非IID级别），校准误差低于或等于等权集成，精度与FedAvg、FedProx、FedMD相当。通信开销224字节/轮，比FedAvg降低912,000倍以上。

Conclusion: 异构架构+加权集成+区块链元数据管理可以有效解决联邦学习中的硬件异构性问题，大幅降低通信开销，同时保持模型性能和校准质量，为实际医疗场景提供了可行的去中心化学习方案。

Abstract: Federated learning is used in medical imaging where privacy prohibits centralizing data. Standard federated algorithms assume homogeneous hardware, identical architectures, and centralized aggregation, which fails when hospitals have unequal compute resources. We propose capacity-aware coordination: measure each hospital's throughput, assign capacity-appropriate architectures (MobileNetV3-Small, EfficientNet-B0, ResNet-50), and combine predictions via weighted ensemble. Weak and strong hospitals can participate without forcing uniform architectures.
  We separate on-chain policy from off-chain learning. A Solidity contract stores hospital registration, benchmark hashes, metrics, and weights. Hospitals train locally and submit only hashes and scalars (not parameters). Weighted ensemble inference is computed off-chain.
  Experiments on PneumoniaMNIST and DermaMNIST (5 seeds, 3 non-IID levels) show our method achieves lower or equal calibration error versus equal-weight ensemble and competitive accuracy versus FedAvg, FedProx, and FedMD. Communication overhead is 224 bytes per round, a reduction of over 912,000x compared to FedAvg.

</details>


### [467] [Batch Normalization Amplifies Memorization and Privacy Risks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24420)
*Ngoc Phu Doan,Chongyan Gu,Ihsen Alouani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究发现批归一化（BN）层会显著增强深度神经网络对离群样本的记忆，进而导致更大的隐私泄露风险（如 Membership Inference Attacks 更容易成功），并从理论和实验两方面验证了这一现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: BN层被广泛用于加速收敛和稳定训练，但其对隐私和记忆化的影响尚不清楚。作者旨在探究BN层是否以及如何加剧模型对离群样本的记忆，进而引发隐私泄露问题。

Method: 采用三种互补实验方法：(i) 离群分布样本的无意记忆测试；(ii) 通过梯度范数测量每个样本的影响；(iii) 成员推断攻击（MIA）的易感性评估。同时进行了理论分析，证明BN会放大离群样本在训练过程中的每步影响。

Result: 跨多个数据集和架构，使用BN的模型比不使用BN的模型显著增强了对离群样本的记忆，并且对成员推断攻击更加脆弱。

Conclusion: BN层放大了稀有或敏感训练样本的影响力，带来了被忽视的隐私风险。研究为理解归一化层如何影响模型记忆提供了理论和实践见解。

Abstract: Batch Normalization (BN) is widely adopted to enable faster convergence and more stable training of deep neural networks. However, its impact on privacy and memorization has remained largely unexplored. In this work, we investigate the effect of BN layers on the memorization of atypical or outlier samples and its implications for privacy leakage. We conduct an extensive empirical study using three complementary approaches: (i) unintended memorization of out-of-distribution training samples, (ii) per-sample influence measured via gradient norms, and (iii) susceptibility to membership inference attacks (MIA). Across multiple datasets and architectures, we consistently observe that BN substantially increases the memorization of outliers compared to models without BN. Critically, this amplified memorization translates directly into privacy vulnerabilities: models with BN exhibit significantly higher susceptibility to MIAs. We complement our empirical findings with a theoretical analysis showing that BN amplifies the per-step influence of outlier samples during training, providing mechanistic insight into this phenomenon. Our results highlight an underappreciated privacy risk associated with BN and provide both practical and theoretical insights into how normalization layers can amplify the influence of rare or sensitive training examples.

</details>


### [468] [Momentum Streams for Optimizer-Inspired Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24425)
*Jingchu Gai,Nai-Chieh Huang,Jiayun Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示预归一化Transformer层的残差更新可视为一阶优化器对代理token能量的一步优化，其中注意力与MLP子层充当梯度预言机。基于此，构建了优化器启发式Transformer家族（三动量、Adam/AdamW、Muon、SOAP），在匹配计算量下对比。主要预训练实验中，三动量TMMFormer取得最低验证损失，超越原始Transformer及先前架构变体。控制消融与理论表明动量（而非预处理）是增益主因。进一步显示动量设计达到更平缓最小值，导致更少遗忘与更好泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 发现预归一化Transformer层残差更新与一阶优化器步骤之间的形式对应关系，从优化视角理解与改进Transformer架构。

Method: 基于残差更新≈优化器步骤的观察，将注意力与MLP视为梯度预言机，设计多种优化器启发式变体（三动量、Adam/AdamW、Muon、SOAP），在匹配计算条件下对比评估。

Result: 三动量TMMFormer在预训练中验证损失最低；动量是主要增益来源而非预处理；动量设计达到更平缓最小值，减少遗忘、提升泛化。

Conclusion: 从优化视角理解Transformer残差更新具有理论价值与实践潜力，动量机制是架构改进的关键方向。

Abstract: The residual update of a pre-norm Transformer layer admits an interpretation as one step of a first-order optimizer acting on a surrogate token energy, wherein the attention and MLP sublayers function as gradient oracles. Based on this observation, we build a family of optimizer-inspired Transformers (triple-momentum, Adam/AdamW, Muon, SOAP) and compare them under matched compute. In our main pretraining experiment, the triple-momentum TMMFormer achieves the lowest validation loss, outperforming the vanilla Transformer and prior architectural variants. A controlled ablation and supporting theory show that momentum, not preconditioning, is the main source of the gain. We further show that TMMFormer and other momentum-based designs reach flatter minima than the vanilla Transformer, which leads to less forgetting and better generalization.

</details>


### [469] [Representation-Guided Discrete Molecular Graph Retrosynthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24428)
*Jiahai Huang,Anjie Qiao,Zhen Wang,Defu Lian,Yutong Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Graph-oriented Representation Guidance (GRG)，通过对扩散生成器引入分子表示引导（如教师分子表示、注入深度、对应策略等），显著提升单步逆合成任务的准确率和多样性，同时加速收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于随机过程的逆合成分子图生成器仅通过产物-反应物对训练，化学表示学习间接且隐式；受计算机视觉中表示引导（如DiTs）启发，探索图特定设计是否能提升逆合成任务的表现。

Method: 在统一设计空间中系统性研究教师分子表示、端点和粒度选择、去噪器注入深度、对应策略和引导方案，提出GRG，并引入基于表示相似度的重排序机制。

Result: 在USPTO-50k上达到58.6/77.2/83.4/87.1的top-1/3/5/10准确率，多样性提升至15.5；OOD设置下所有top-k指标一致提升；收敛epoch数减少35%，时间减少30%。

Conclusion: 表示引导能有效促进模型学习内在化学语义，提升生成质量和效率，且无需额外训练验证器即可进一步优化排序列表顶部结果。

Abstract: Stochastic process-based molecular graph generators have become the state of the art for template-free single-step retrosynthesis. However, these models are typically trained only on product-reactant pairs, thereby acquiring chemistry-relevant representations in an indirect and implicit manner. Meanwhile, recent advances in computer vision demonstrate that offering representation guidance to a generator can effectively distill semantics from pretrained encoders into DiTs, substantially improving both convergence and generation quality. Whether similar gains extend to the retrosynthesis task, and what graph-specific design choices can make them work, remains an open question. To address these questions, we conduct a systematic empirical study over a unified design space spanning teacher molecular representations, endpoint and granularity choices, injection depths in the denoiser, correspondence strategies and guidance scheme. Guided by these considerations, we develop Graph-oriented Representation Guidance (GRG), which achieves 58.6 / 77.2 / 83.4 / 87.1 top-1 / 3 / 5 / 10 accuracy on USPTO-50k, while increasing diversity to 15.5, both substantially outperforming the adopted base generator. Notably, GRG consistently improves all top-k metrics in out-of-distribution settings, suggesting that representation guidance facilitates the acquisition of intrinsic chemical semantics. Meanwhile, the introduced representation guidance reduces the number of epochs by 35% and the wall-clock time by 30% to reach comparable performance. In addition, we introduce a simple yet effective representation-similarity-based reranking mechanism, which further improves the top of the ranked list without training an additional verifier.

</details>


### [470] [CAffNet: Hard Constraint-Affine Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24437)
*Yang Zhao,Jungeun Lee,Jeong hwan Jeon,Sze Zheng Yong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CAffNet框架，通过可训练的约束仿射层将硬约束嵌入神经网络，在保证约束满足的同时保持通用逼近性，且支持联合优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统约束方法（软约束无保证、后处理次优）无法同时满足约束保证和最优性，需一种可训练且保证约束满足的嵌入方法。

Method: 在神经网络中引入可训练的约束仿射（CAffine）层，构造CAffNet，支持输入依赖的任意基数仿射约束，不受约束空间维度限制。

Result: 实验表明在多个需要保证约束满足的领域表现稳健，证明方法有效且保持通用逼近性。

Conclusion: CAffNet首次实现可训练的硬约束嵌入，兼顾约束保证与优化性能，具有良好的理论保证和实际适用性。

Abstract: We present a novel framework for embedding hard constraint satisfaction into neural network (NN) architectures, specifically feedforward neural networks and transformers, with input-dependent affine constraints of arbitrary cardinality. Traditional constraint enforcement approaches either rely on penalty-based soft constraints, which offer no guarantee of satisfaction, or on post-processing methods that enforce constraints after the NN is trained, which may lead to suboptimality. We introduce a trainable constraint-affine (CAffine) layer into NNs, yielding CAffNet, which goes beyond enforcing affine constraints via fixed orthogonal or parallel projections and enables joint optimization with network parameters. Moreover, we impose no restrictions on the constraint space dimensions and establish that our construction preserves the universal approximation properties of NNs, while providing provable guarantees on constraint adherence for all inputs. Experimental validation demonstrates robust performance across diverse domains requiring guaranteed constraint satisfaction.

</details>


### [471] [Balancing Fairness, Privacy, and Accuracy: A Multitask Adversarial Framework for Centralized Data-Driven Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24458)
*Imesh Ekanayake,Elham Naghizade,Jeffrey Chan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种多任务对抗模型，将公平性和隐私性作为核心目标，通过学习隐藏敏感属性的潜在表示，在保证准确率的同时动态平衡公平与隐私，实验表明该方法能够在多种数据集上实现高标准公平与隐私且准确率损失极小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有集中式数据驱动应用中，同时兼顾公平性、隐私性和准确性的方法很少，而这三者之间存在相互冲突的要求，难以同时优化。现有方法往往将公平和隐私作为事后考虑，缺乏系统性的联合优化方案。

Method: 提出了一种新颖的多任务对抗模型，将公平性和隐私性作为核心目标而非事后处理；通过学习隐藏敏感属性的潜在表示（latent representation），在保留任务相关信息的同时消除敏感特征；通过优化的成本函数动态平衡公平性、准确率和隐私性。

Result: 在多种数据集上的广泛测试表明，该方法能够在严格条件下实现高标准的公平性和隐私性，且准确率损失极小；与最先进的隐私和公平基准相比，该方法在公平、隐私和准确率优化方面的鲁棒性更强，跨数据集适应性更好。

Conclusion: 该多任务对抗模型有效解决了公平性、隐私性和准确性三者难以兼顾的难题，为集中式数据驱动应用提供了一种兼顾伦理标准和隐私法规的可行方案。

Abstract: The integration of fairness and privacy in centralized data-driven applications is critical, especially as these systems increasingly influence sectors with significant societal impact. Current methods rarely address privacy, fairness, and accuracy together, which can potentially compromise ethical standards and privacy regulations. However, balancing these three objectives is quite challenging since each of objective often imposes conflicting requirements on the design and training of models, making it difficult to optimize one without compromising the others. This paper introduces a novel multitask adversarial model that treats fairness and privacy as integral objectives rather than afterthoughts, and learns a latent representation that hides sensitive attributes while preserving essential task-related information. Our approach dynamically balances fairness with accuracy and privacy through an optimized cost function with minimal performance loss even under strict conditions. Extensive testing on diverse datasets shows the ability of our model to achieve high standards of fairness and privacy without significant sacrifice to accuracy. Benchmarking against state-of-the-art privacy and fairness standards shows that our method enhances the robustness of privacy, fairness, and accuracy optimization, proving its adaptability across various datasets.

</details>


### [472] [The Normalized Maximum Likelihood for Regular Non-Smooth Models: Measure-Theoretic Foundations and Geometric Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24477)
*Trenton Lau,Gary P. T. Choi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对非光滑估计器（如Lasso、稀疏SVM）建立了规范最大似然（NML）编码长度的严格计算框架，利用几何测度论与保守雅可比矩阵证明了非光滑模型随机复杂度的良定义性，并提出了PDL-PPMH采样器实现高效计算，实验表明该方法可作为数据高效的交叉验证替代方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NML编码长度计算方法仅适用于光滑模型，而现代机器学习中广泛使用的非光滑估计器（如Lasso、稀疏SVM）无法直接应用，亟需建立适用于非光滑模型的严格NML计算框架。

Method: 1) 应用几何测度论与保守雅可比矩阵，将coarea公式推广至非光滑PDL估计器；2) 提出PDL-PPMH采样器，包含随机切空间提议与非光滑投影求解器；3) 理论证明该采样器的收敛性及NML准则的良定义性。

Result: 在高维Lasso后验采样（P=2000）中验证了方法的鲁棒性；实验表明精确NML准则在预测性能上与交叉验证无统计显著差异，且无需数据分割，数据效率更高。

Conclusion: 本文为非光滑规则化模型的NML编码长度理论分析铺平了道路，提供了一种理论上严谨、计算上可行的替代交叉验证的方案。

Abstract: The Normalized Maximum Likelihood (NML) codelength, or stochastic complexity, represents a principled criterion for universal coding. While recent coarea-based formulations provided a calculation method for smooth models, this framework collapses for the non-smooth estimators ubiquitous in modern machine learning (e.g., Lasso, Sparse SVMs). In this work, we provide a rigorous framework for computing the NML for regular path-differentiable Lipschitz (PDL) estimators. By applying classical geometric measure theory and bridging the coarea formula with conservative Jacobians, we prove that the stochastic complexity for non-smooth models is well-posed and theoretically consistent with the outputs of modern Automatic Differentiation. To compute this quantity exactly, we introduce the Propose-and-Project Metropolis-Hastings (PDL-PPMH) sampler, a geometric MCMC algorithm capable of traversing the non-differentiable level sets of the maximum likelihood estimator. We theoretically justify its components, including a stochastic tangent space proposal and a provably convergent non-smooth projection solver. We demonstrate the method's robustness by sampling from a high-dimensional Lasso posterior ($P=2000$), while simultaneously quantifying the computational scaling that governs the trade-off between exactness and mixing time. Crucially, we empirically demonstrate that our exact NML criterion provides a highly data-efficient alternative to cross-validation, achieving statistically indistinguishable predictive optima without requiring data splitting. Altogether, our work paves the way for the theoretical analysis of the NML codelength for regular non-smooth models.

</details>


### [473] [Zeroth-Order Nonconvex Nonsmooth Optimization with Heavy-Tailed Noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24513)
*Zhuanghua Liu,Luo Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对具有重尾噪声的非凸非光滑随机优化问题，提出了一种基于两点评分梯度估计裁剪的随机零阶算法，并证明了其在Goldstein平稳点上的最优oracle复杂度，数值实验验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多机器学习应用中存在重尾噪声，但现有零阶优化算法在处理非凸非光滑问题且带重尾噪声时，复杂度结果尚不理想。本文旨在设计一个在维度依赖和精度参数依赖上都达到最优的随机零阶算法。

Method: 提出随机零阶算法，通过裁剪两点评分梯度估计器来细化在线到非凸转换框架，从而处理重尾噪声下的非凸非光滑问题。

Result: 算法找到$(δ, ε)$-Goldstein稳定点的零阶oracle复杂度为${\mathcal O}(d^{\frac{p}{2(p-1)}}δ^{-1}ε^{-\frac{2p-1}{p-1}})$，其中维度依赖与随机凸非光滑零阶优化最优结果匹配，精度参数依赖与随机一阶算法最优结果一致。

Conclusion: 所提算法在理论复杂度上达到了最优，数值实验也验证了其有效性，为重尾噪声下的非凸非光滑随机优化提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: This paper considers the nonconvex nonsmooth problem in which the objective function is Lipschitz continuous. We focus on the stochastic setting where the algorithm can access stochastic function value evaluations with heavy-tailed noise, which is prevalent in many popular machine learning applications. We propose a stochastic zeroth-order algorithm that refines the framework of online-to-nonconvex conversion by clipping the two-point gradient estimator. The theoretical analysis shows that our algorithm can find a $(δ, ε)$-Goldstein stationary point with zeroth-order oracle complexity of ${\mathcal O}(d^{\frac{p}{2(p-1)}}δ^{-1}ε^{-\frac{2p-1}{p-1}})$, where $d$ is the problem dimension and $p\in(1,2]$ is the order of bounded moments. Note that our dependence on dimension $d$ matches the best-known results of stochastic zeroth-order optimization for finding the sub-optimal solution of a stochastic convex nonsmooth problem. In addition, our dependence on accuracy parameters $δ$ and $ε$ is consistent with that of the best-known stochastic first-order algorithms for stochastic nonconvex nonsmooth problems. Finally, we conduct numerical experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.

</details>


### [474] [Lake Detection and Water Quality Estimation in Sentinel-2 Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24515)
*Iulia Pleşu,Alexandra Băicoianu,Ioana Cristina Plajer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文比较了三种机器学习架构用于水体识别和监测，并提出了适用于水指数的新型颜色方案，以改善水质评估的可视化与解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 气候变化和人类活动导致内陆水资源日益稀缺和脆弱，亟需可靠、自动化的地表水体检测与监测方法。

Method: 研究比较了三种不同的机器学习架构进行水体识别，并通过定量指标和实际案例评估性能；同时与经典NDWI阈值法进行对比；此外，提出了针对水指数的新型有意义颜色方案。

Result: 识别出在准确性、鲁棒性和实际适用性方面表现最佳的模型；证明了数据驱动方法与传统指数方法的差异。

Conclusion: 本文提出的颜色方案可改善水质指数的可视化，有助于用户更清晰地解释和比较水环境数据，支持更好的决策。

Abstract: With climate change and increasing human pressure on natural landscapes, inland water resources are becoming progressively scarcer, more vulnerable, and more difficult to manage sustainably. Reliable and automated methods for detecting, monitoring, and assessing surface water bodies are therefore of growing scientific and practical importance. In this paper, we investigate and compare three distinct machine learning architectures for water body identification and monitoring. Their performance is evaluated through quantitative metrics and real-world examples. Furthermore, a direct comparison with classical NDWI thresholding is conducted on a representative test image to highlight differences between data-driven and index-based approaches. This analysis allows us to identify the best-performing model in terms of accuracy, robustness, and practical applicability. Beyond detection, a major challenge for meaningful water quality assessment lies in the consistent and interpretable visualization of spectral water indices. Standard color mapping techniques are often inadequate or potentially misleading for environmental applications. To address this gap, we propose a suite of meaningful color schemes adapted for water quality indices, facilitating clearer interpretation, comparison, and decision-making for human users.

</details>


### [475] [ECHO: Terminal Agents Learn World Models for Free](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24517)
*Vaishnavi Shrivastava,Piero Kauffmann,Ahmed Awadallah,Dimitris Papailiopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出ECHO混合目标函数，通过在标准策略梯度损失上增加辅助的环境观测预测损失，将终端反馈转化为密集监督信号，使CLI智能体性能翻倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GRPO等强化学习方法只对动作token使用稀疏的最终结果奖励，忽略了回滚中丰富的环境反馈信息（stdout、错误、文件等），导致失败回滚提供的策略梯度信号很弱。

Method: ECHO在GRPO的前向传播基础上增加辅助损失：训练策略预测自身动作产生的环境观测token（即终端返回的流）。无需额外回滚，与GRPO共享同一前向传播。

Result: 在TerminalBench-2.0上，Qwen3-8B pass@1从2.70%提升至5.17%，Qwen3-14B从5.17%提升至10.79%；对非自身生成的轨迹也显著降低环境token交叉熵；无专家演示时匹配SFT+GRPO性能。

Conclusion: 环境观测不仅是未来动作的上下文，更是每个回滚中已存在的密集在线监督信号，可用于无验证器的自我改进。

Abstract: CLI agents are the closest thing language models have to an embodied setting: the model emits commands, the terminal executes them, and the returned stream -- stdout, errors, files, logs, and traces -- records the consequences. We argue that this stream is a supervision signal, but standard agent RL discards it: GRPO-style training updates action tokens with sparse outcome-level rewards while ignoring environment responses already in the rollout. Failed rollouts provide little policy-gradient signal despite containing rich evidence about how the environment responds. We introduce ECHO (Environment Cross-entropy Hybrid Objective), a hybrid objective that combines the standard policy-gradient loss on action tokens with an auxiliary loss that trains the policy to predict environment observation tokens resulting from its own actions. ECHO reuses the same forward pass as GRPO, requires no additional rollouts, and turns terminal feedback into dense supervision for all rollouts. ECHO doubles GRPO pass@1 on TerminalBench-2.0: Qwen3-8B improves from 2.70% to 5.17%, and Qwen3-14B from 5.17% to 10.79%. ECHO also produces policies that better predict terminal dynamics, even on trajectories they did not generate: across held-out rollouts, it sharply reduces environment-token cross-entropy while GRPO alone barely changes it. From base Qwen3-8B, ECHO matches expert-SFT-then-GRPO performance on held-out terminal tasks without expert demonstrations, and recovers roughly half of the expert-SFT initialization benefit on TerminalBench-2.0. In some settings, the environment prediction loss alone enables verifier-free self-improvement, allowing policies to improve on unseen OOD tasks by learning only from environment interactions. Together, these results suggest that environment observations are not merely context for future actions, but a dense, on-policy supervision signal already present in every rollout.

</details>


### [476] [MindAlign: Bridging EEG, Vision, and Language for Zero-Shot Visual Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24523)
*Zexuan Chen,Sichao Liu,Runhao Lu,Huichao Qi,Alexandra Woolgar,Xi Vincent Wang,Lihui Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种三模态对比学习框架，通过EEG、视觉和文本对齐实现脑信号视觉解码，在Things-EEG2基准上达到54.1% Top-1准确率，远超先前基线（32.4%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脑信号视觉解码是连接计算机视觉与神经科学的关键挑战，现有方法在跨模态对齐和语义泛化方面存在不足，需要更鲁棒的框架来桥接神经表征与视觉计算模型。

Method: 两阶段设计：1) 通过掩码重建预训练EEG编码器，学习时空规律；2) 通过三模态对比学习对齐EEG、图像和LLM生成的文本描述，文本作为语义正则化器。编码器包含主体自适应、图注意力通道机制和时空卷积嵌入。

Result: 在Things-EEG2 200-way零样本基准上Top-1准确率54.1%（基线32.4%），Top-5准确率83.4%（基线64.0%），Wilcoxon检验p<0.01。在Things-MEG上验证了泛化能力。

Conclusion: 该工作朝着鲁棒、语义导向的非侵入式时序神经信号视觉解码迈出了关键一步，代码已开源。

Abstract: Visual decoding from brain signals is a key challenge at the intersection of computer vision and neuroscience, requiring methods that bridge neural representations and computational models of vision. We introduce a tri-modal contrastive framework for EEG-based visual decoding that aligns EEG, visual, and textual representations within a unified latent space. Our approach follows a two-stage design. First, we pre-train an EEG encoder via masked reconstruction on unlabeled trials, learning spatio-temporal regularities that transfer robustly to downstream tasks. Second, we jointly align EEG, image, and LLM-generated textual descriptions through contrastive learning, where text supervision acts as a semantic regularizer that injects linguistic structure into the shared space without overwhelming the primary EEG-image signal. The encoder integrates subject-specific adaptation, graph-attention over channels, and temporal-spatial convolutional embeddings. On the Things-EEG2 200-way zero-shot benchmark, our framework achieves 54.1% Top-1 and 83.4% Top-5 accuracy, substantially exceeding the strongest prior baseline (32.4% / 64.0%), with paired Wilcoxon tests confirming significance (p < 0.01) over all in-subject baselines. We validate generalization on Things-MEG. Analysis reveals that compact embedding geometries (CN-CLIP) outperform much larger backbones, and that decoding aligns with established neurophysiology of visual processing.
